            "application/vnd.google.colaboratory.intrinsic+json": {
              "type": "dataframe",
              "summary": "{\n  \"name\": \"dynamic_cost_bps\",\n  \"rows\": 1,\n  \"fields\": [\n    {\n      \"column\": 2,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": null,\n        \"min\": 0.279,\n        \"max\": 0.279,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.279\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 3,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": null,\n        \"min\": 0.279,\n        \"max\": 0.279,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.279\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 5,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": null,\n        \"min\": 0.25,\n        \"max\": 0.25,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.25\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 7,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": null,\n        \"min\": 0.25,\n        \"max\": 0.25,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.25\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 10,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": null,\n        \"min\": 0.25,\n        \"max\": 0.25,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.25\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 16. V3 transaction-cost layer: Corwin--Schultz ETF-proxy spread estimator =====\n",
        "# Transaction-cost principle:\n",
        "# - Corwin--Schultz estimates a full bid-ask spread from high-low ranges.\n",
        "# - Strategy turnover is one-way notional turnover, so we charge half the estimated spread per traded notional.\n",
        "# - Treasury constant-maturity series do not contain OHLC or quotes, so V3 uses liquid ETF proxies when available.\n",
        "# - Fixed-bps grids are retained as sensitivity checks, not as the main cost model.\n",
        "\n",
        "TC_COST_MODE = \"corwin_schultz_etf_proxy\"  # fallback: fixed_bps_by_tenor if yfinance/OHLC unavailable\n",
        "TC_ROLLING_MONTHS = 12\n",
        "TC_MIN_ONEWAY_BPS = 0.25\n",
        "TC_MAX_ONEWAY_BPS = 25.0\n",
        "TC_PROXY_TICKERS = {2: \"SHY\", 3: \"SHY\", 5: \"IEI\", 7: \"IEF\", 10: \"IEF\"}\n",
        "TC_FIXED_ONEWAY_BPS = {2: 2.0, 3: 2.0, 5: 3.0, 7: 4.0, 10: 4.0}\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def corwin_schultz_full_spread(high, low):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Corwin--Schultz full relative spread from daily high/low prices.\n",
        "\n",
        "    Returns a daily full-spread estimate in relative units. Negative alphas are clipped to zero;\n",
        "    the output is winsorized later. This is used on ETF OHLC proxies, not on raw yield series.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    high = pd.Series(high).astype(float)\n",
        "    low = pd.Series(low).astype(float)\n",
        "    valid = (high > 0) & (low > 0) & np.isfinite(high) & np.isfinite(low)\n",
        "    high = high.where(valid)\n",
        "    low = low.where(valid)\n",
        "\n",
        "    log_hl = np.log(high / low)\n",
        "    beta = log_hl.pow(2).rolling(2).sum()\n",
        "    high_2d = pd.concat([high, high.shift(1)], axis=1).max(axis=1)\n",
        "    low_2d = pd.concat([low, low.shift(1)], axis=1).min(axis=1)\n",
        "    gamma = np.log(high_2d / low_2d).pow(2)\n",
        "    denom = 3 - 2*np.sqrt(2)\n",
        "    alpha = ((np.sqrt(2*beta) - np.sqrt(beta)) / denom) - np.sqrt(gamma / denom)\n",
        "    alpha = alpha.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).clip(lower=0)\n",
        "    full_spread = 2 * (np.exp(alpha) - 1) / (1 + np.exp(alpha))\n",
        "    return full_spread.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).clip(lower=0, upper=0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def fetch_yfinance_ohlc(ticker, start=START, end=END):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Fetch daily OHLC with yfinance; returns None if unavailable.\"\"\"\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        import yfinance as yf\n",
        "    except Exception as e:\n",
        "        warnings.warn(f\"yfinance unavailable; cannot estimate CS costs from ETF OHLC. Error: {e}\")\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        df = yf.download(ticker, start=start, end=end, auto_adjust=False, progress=False, threads=False)\n",
        "        if df is None or df.empty:\n",
        "            return None\n",
        "        if isinstance(df.columns, pd.MultiIndex):\n",
        "            df.columns = df.columns.get_level_values(0)\n",
        "        cols = [c for c in [\"Open\", \"High\", \"Low\", \"Close\", \"Adj Close\"] if c in df.columns]\n",
        "        df = df[cols].copy()\n",
        "        df.index = pd.to_datetime(df.index)\n",
        "        return df\n",
        "    except Exception as e:\n",
        "        warnings.warn(f\"Could not fetch {ticker} OHLC from yfinance. Error: {e}\")\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_corwin_schultz_cost_bps(index, tenors=TENORS, proxy_map=TC_PROXY_TICKERS):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Build monthly one-way cost bps by tenor from ETF OHLC proxies.\n",
        "\n",
        "    The mapped ETF's daily CS full-spread is converted to one-way bps = 0.5 * full spread * 10,000.\n",
        "    Monthly costs use a rolling median to reduce noise and are forward-filled to strategy dates.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    unique_tickers = sorted(set(proxy_map.values()))\n",
        "    ticker_monthly = {}\n",
        "    for tic in unique_tickers:\n",
        "        ohlc = fetch_yfinance_ohlc(tic, start=str(pd.Timestamp(index.min()).date()), end=str(pd.Timestamp(index.max()).date()))\n",
        "        if ohlc is None or not {\"High\", \"Low\"}.issubset(ohlc.columns):\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        full_spread = corwin_schultz_full_spread(ohlc[\"High\"], ohlc[\"Low\"])\n",
        "        oneway_bps_daily = 0.5 * full_spread * 10000.0\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_daily.resample(\"ME\").median()\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_monthly.rolling(TC_ROLLING_MONTHS, min_periods=3).median()\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_monthly.clip(lower=TC_MIN_ONEWAY_BPS, upper=TC_MAX_ONEWAY_BPS)\n",
        "        ticker_monthly[tic] = oneway_bps_monthly\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not ticker_monthly:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "\n",
        "    cost = pd.DataFrame(index=index, columns=tenors, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for n in tenors:\n",
        "        tic = proxy_map[n]\n",
        "        if tic in ticker_monthly:\n",
        "            cost[n] = ticker_monthly[tic].reindex(index).ffill().bfill()\n",
        "    if cost.dropna(how=\"all\").empty:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    return cost.ffill().bfill().clip(lower=TC_MIN_ONEWAY_BPS, upper=TC_MAX_ONEWAY_BPS)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def fixed_cost_bps_df(index, tenors=TENORS, fixed_map=TC_FIXED_ONEWAY_BPS):\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame({n: fixed_map.get(n, np.nan) for n in tenors}, index=index).astype(float)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Build default V3 cost matrix.\n",
        "try:\n",
        "    dynamic_cost_bps = build_corwin_schultz_cost_bps(dates, TENORS)\n",
        "except Exception as e:\n",
        "    warnings.warn(f\"CS cost builder failed; using fixed tenor bps fallback. Error: {e}\")\n",
        "    dynamic_cost_bps = None\n",
        "\n",
        "if dynamic_cost_bps is None or dynamic_cost_bps.dropna(how=\"all\").empty:\n",
        "    COST_SOURCE = \"fixed_bps_by_tenor_fallback\"\n",
        "    dynamic_cost_bps = fixed_cost_bps_df(dates, TENORS)\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    COST_SOURCE = \"corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread\"\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V3 cost source:\", COST_SOURCE)\n",
        "print(\"One-way cost bps by tenor, latest:\")\n",
        "display(dynamic_cost_bps.tail(3))\n",
        "print(\"Average one-way cost bps in evaluation window:\")\n",
        "display(dynamic_cost_bps.loc[dates[MINW+H]:].mean().to_frame(\"avg_oneway_bps\").T.round(3))\n",
        "\n",
        "dynamic_cost_bps.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_dynamic_oneway_cost_bps_by_tenor.csv\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 18,
      "id": "35194829",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "35194829",
        "outputId": "68dc4b7c-407a-41a5-8086-dac0e00fb608"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Constructed V3 variants: 16\n",
            "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_smooth_a035_b05 avg gross 0.989 avg net 0.989 ann turnover 1.342\n",
            "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_quarterly avg gross 1.0 avg net 1.0 ann turnover 1.446\n",
            "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_quarterly_smooth avg gross 0.997 avg net 0.997 ann turnover 1.333\n",
            "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_cost_hurdle avg gross 0.993 avg net 0.993 ann turnover 1.62\n",
            "V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_smooth_a035_b05 avg gross 0.989 avg net 0.989 ann turnover 1.341\n",
            "V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_quarterly avg gross 1.0 avg net 1.0 ann turnover 1.464\n",
            "V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_quarterly_smooth avg gross 0.997 avg net 0.997 ann turnover 1.351\n",
            "V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_cost_hurdle avg gross 0.993 avg net 0.993 ann turnover 1.622\n",
            "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_smooth_a035_b05 avg gross 1.642 avg net 0.989 ann turnover 3.388\n",
            "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_quarterly avg gross 1.732 avg net 1.0 ann turnover 3.592\n",
            "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_quarterly_smooth avg gross 1.679 avg net 0.997 ann turnover 3.297\n",
            "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_cost_hurdle avg gross 1.774 avg net 0.999 ann turnover 3.426\n",
            "V3_G4_core_tail_es_smooth_a035_b05 avg gross 0.989 avg net 0.989 ann turnover 1.382\n",
            "V3_G4_core_tail_es_quarterly avg gross 1.0 avg net 1.0 ann turnover 1.459\n",
            "V3_G4_core_tail_es_quarterly_smooth avg gross 0.997 avg net 0.997 ann turnover 1.331\n",
            "V3_G4_core_tail_es_cost_hurdle avg gross 0.993 avg net 0.993 ann turnover 1.656\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "# ===== 17. V3 turnover controls and cost-aware implementation wrappers =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def quarterly_rebalance_targets(W_in):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Keep target weights fixed within calendar quarters using the first available month of each quarter.\"\"\"\n",
        "    W = W_in.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Robust quarter labels\n",
        "    idx = pd.to_datetime(W.index)\n",
        "    q = pd.Series(idx.to_period(\"Q\"), index=W.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # First available observation of each quarter\n",
        "    is_reb = q.ne(q.shift()).values\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Build target DataFrame explicitly to avoid DataFrame.where shape errors\n",
        "    target = pd.DataFrame(np.nan, index=W.index, columns=W.columns, dtype=float)\n",
        "    target.iloc[is_reb, :] = W.iloc[is_reb, :].values\n",
        "\n",
        "    return target.ffill().fillna(0.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _row_reindex_or_default(df, dt, cols, default_value=5.0):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Return df row at dt reindexed to cols, with robust fallback.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if df is None or len(df) == 0:\n",
        "        return pd.Series(default_value, index=cols, dtype=float)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if dt in df.index:\n",
        "        row = df.reindex(columns=cols).loc[dt].astype(float)\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        row = pd.Series(np.nan, index=cols, dtype=float)\n",
        "\n",
        "    vals = row.values.astype(float)\n",
        "    if np.isfinite(vals).any():\n",
        "        fill_val = np.nanmedian(vals[np.isfinite(vals)])\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        fill_val = default_value\n",
        "\n",
        "    return row.fillna(fill_val).astype(float)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def apply_cost_hurdle(W_target, cost_bps_df, hurdle_mult=1.25, alpha=1.0, no_trade_band=0.02):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Implementation-hurdle wrapper around a target strategy.\n",
        "\n",
        "    A rebalance is accepted only if the expected 12m return improvement versus current holdings\n",
        "    exceeds a multiple of the one-way estimated trading cost. Accepted trades can be partially\n",
        "    implemented through alpha smoothing. This is deliberately simple and transparent.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    W = W_target.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "    out = pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=W.index, columns=W.columns)\n",
        "\n",
        "    prev = np.zeros(W.shape[1], dtype=float)\n",
        "    cols = list(W.columns)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i, dt in enumerate(W.index):\n",
        "        target = W.iloc[i].values.astype(float)\n",
        "        delta = target - prev\n",
        "\n",
        "        # No-trade band on total absolute weight change\n",
        "        if np.nansum(np.abs(delta)) < no_trade_band:\n",
        "            out.iloc[i, :] = prev\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Expected 12m return forecast, aligned to current strategy columns\n",
        "        if dt in forecast_er.index:\n",
        "            mu = forecast_er.reindex(columns=cols).loc[dt].astype(float).values\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            mu = np.full(len(cols), np.nan)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not np.isfinite(mu).any():\n",
        "            out.iloc[i, :] = prev\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Dynamic one-way cost in bps, aligned to current strategy columns\n",
        "        cbps = _row_reindex_or_default(cost_bps_df, dt, cols, default_value=5.0).values\n",
        "        cbps = np.where(np.isfinite(cbps), cbps, 5.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        one_way_cost = float(np.nansum(np.abs(delta) * cbps / 10000.0))\n",
        "        er_gain_12m = float(np.nansum(delta * mu))\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Implementation hurdle: accept trade only if expected return gain clears estimated trading cost\n",
        "        if er_gain_12m >= hurdle_mult * one_way_cost:\n",
        "            new = (1.0 - alpha) * prev + alpha * target\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            new = prev\n",
        "\n",
        "        out.iloc[i, :] = new\n",
        "        prev = new\n",
        "\n",
        "    return out\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_v3_weight_variants(base_weights_dict):\n",
        "    variants = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "    for name, W0 in base_weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        if not name.startswith(\"G\"):\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        W0 = W0.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Smooth monthly implementation: directly addresses the V2 turnover problem.\n",
        "        variants[f\"V3_{name}_smooth_a035_b05\"] = smooth_weights(\n",
        "            W0, alpha=0.35, no_trade_band=0.05\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Quarterly rebalance: coarse implementation schedule, no look-ahead.\n",
        "        Wq = quarterly_rebalance_targets(W0)\n",
        "        variants[f\"V3_{name}_quarterly\"] = Wq\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Quarterly + smoothing: more institutional implementation.\n",
        "        variants[f\"V3_{name}_quarterly_smooth\"] = smooth_weights(\n",
        "            Wq, alpha=0.50, no_trade_band=0.03\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Cost hurdle: only rebalance if expected return gain clears estimated cost.\n",
        "        variants[f\"V3_{name}_cost_hurdle\"] = apply_cost_hurdle(\n",
        "            W0,\n",
        "            dynamic_cost_bps,\n",
        "            hurdle_mult=1.25,\n",
        "            alpha=0.75,\n",
        "            no_trade_band=0.03\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return variants\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "V3_WEIGHTS = build_v3_weight_variants(G_WEIGHTS)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Constructed V3 variants:\", len(V3_WEIGHTS))\n",
        "\n",
        "eval_start = dates[MINW + H] if \"dates\" in globals() else None\n",
        "\n",
        "for k, w in V3_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "    if eval_start is not None:\n",
        "        w_eval = w.loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        w_eval = w\n",
        "\n",
        "    avg_gross = w.abs().sum(axis=1).replace(0, np.nan).mean()\n",
        "    avg_net = w.sum(axis=1).replace(0, np.nan).mean()\n",
        "    ann_turnover = w_eval.diff().abs().sum(axis=1).mean() * 12\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\n",
        "        k,\n",
        "        \"avg gross\", round(float(avg_gross), 3),\n",
        "        \"avg net\", round(float(avg_net), 3),\n",
        "        \"ann turnover\", round(float(ann_turnover), 3)\n",
        "    )"
      ]
    },
    {

      "outputs": [

          "text": [
            "V3 performance table: sorted by Sharpe\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "                                                                             cost_model  \\\n",
              "name                                                                                      \n",
              "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_cost_hurdle_dynamicTC        corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G4_core_tail_es_cost_hurdle_dynamicTC           corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_smooth_a035_b05_dynamicTC    corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G3_core_short_dv01_cost_hurdle_dynamicTC        corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G4_core_tail_es_quarterly_dynamicTC             corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_cost_hurdle_dynamicTC       corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",
              "V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_quarterly_dynamicTC          corwin_schultz_etf_proxy_half_spread   \n",

},\n    {\n      \"column\": \"avg_cost_bps_ann\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 11.337819650837128,\n        \"min\": 0.36703578645589524,\n        \"max\": 35.92291220556746,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 38,\n        \"samples\": [\n          33.8848952357434\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n       ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 18. V3 dynamic-cost backtest and comparison with V2 baselines =====\n",
        "def strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(weights, ret_excess_df, cost_bps_df):\n",
        "    Wlag = lag_weights(weights)\n",
        "    gross_ret = (Wlag * ret_excess_df[weights.columns]).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    turnover_by_tenor = weights.diff().abs().fillna(weights.abs())\n",
        "    cbps = cost_bps_df.reindex(weights.index).ffill().bfill()[weights.columns]\n",
        "    cost = (turnover_by_tenor * (cbps / 10000.0)).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    turnover = turnover_by_tenor.sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    return gross_ret - cost, gross_ret, cost, turnover\n",
        "\n",
        "# Build a common comparison set: V2 Track A, V3 controlled versions, and key benchmarks.\n",
        "compare_weights = {}\n",
        "for k in [\"G1_sparse_core_vol\", \"G2_sparse_core_dv01\", \"G3_core_short_dv01\", \"G4_core_tail_es\", \"E_10Y_timing\"]:\n",
        "    if k in W_used:\n",
        "        compare_weights[k] = W_used[k]\n",
        "compare_weights.update(V3_WEIGHTS)\n",
        "\n",
        "v3_rows = []\n",
        "v3_returns = {}\n",
        "v3_turnover = {}\n",
        "for name, bret in bench.items():\n",
        "    r_eval = bret.loc[dates[MINW+H:]]\n",
        "    row = perf_stats(r_eval, name=name)\n",
        "    row[\"cost_model\"] = \"none\"\n",
        "    v3_rows.append(row)\n",
        "    v3_returns[name] = bret\n",
        "\n",
        "for name, weights in compare_weights.items():\n",
        "    r_net, r_gross, cost, to = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(weights, ret_excess, dynamic_cost_bps)\n",
        "    nm = f\"{name}_dynamicTC\"\n",
        "    row = perf_stats(r_net.loc[dates[MINW+H:]], turnover=to.loc[dates[MINW+H:]], name=nm)\n",
        "    row[\"cost_model\"] = COST_SOURCE\n",
        "    row[\"avg_cost_bps_ann\"] = cost.loc[dates[MINW+H:]].mean()*12*10000\n",
        "    v3_rows.append(row)\n",
        "    v3_returns[nm] = r_net\n",
        "    v3_turnover[nm] = to\n",
        "\n",
        "# Add 10bp fixed-cost table for direct comparability with V2.\n",
        "for name, weights in compare_weights.items():\n",
        "    r_net, r_gross, cost, to = strategy_returns(weights, ret_excess, cost_bps=10.0)\n",
        "    nm = f\"{name}_fixed10bp\"\n",
        "    row = perf_stats(r_net.loc[dates[MINW+H:]], turnover=to.loc[dates[MINW+H:]], name=nm)\n",
        "    row[\"cost_model\"] = \"fixed_10bp_oneway\"\n",
        "    row[\"avg_cost_bps_ann\"] = cost.loc[dates[MINW+H:]].mean()*12*10000\n",
        "    v3_rows.append(row)\n",
        "\n",
        "v3_perf = pd.DataFrame(v3_rows).set_index(\"name\")\n",
        "cols_order = [c for c in [\"cost_model\", \"n\", \"ann_ret\", \"ann_vol\", \"Sharpe\", \"MaxDD\", \"hit_rate\", \"ann_turnover\", \"avg_cost_bps_ann\"] if c in v3_perf.columns]\n",
        "v3_perf = v3_perf[cols_order]\n",
        "v3_perf.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_performance_dynamic_and_fixed_costs.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V3 performance table: sorted by Sharpe\")\n",
        "display(v3_perf.sort_values(\"Sharpe\", ascending=False).head(40))\n"
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 19. V3 statistical and exposure diagnostics =====\n",
        "v3_stat_rows = []\n",
        "eval_start = dates[MINW + H]\n",
        "for nm, rser in v3_returns.items():\n",
        "    if (\"V3_\" in nm) or (\"G1_\" in nm) or (\"G2_\" in nm) or (\"G3_\" in nm) or (\"G4_\" in nm) or (\"E_10Y\" in nm):\n",
        "        ann_mean, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(rser.loc[eval_start:], lag=12)\n",
        "        v3_stat_rows.append({\"strategy\": nm, \"ann_mean\": ann_mean, \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t})\n",
        "v3_mean_tests = pd.DataFrame(v3_stat_rows).set_index(\"strategy\").sort_values(\"NW_t_mean\", ascending=False)\n",
        "v3_mean_tests.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_strategy_mean_nw_tests.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V3 mean-return Newey-West tests\")\n",
        "display(v3_mean_tests.head(40))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Exposure diagnostics for V3 strategies, same definitions as V2.\n",
        "v3_expo_rows = []\n",
        "static10 = ret_excess[10].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "ewbasket = ret_excess[TENORS].mean(1).loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "for name, weights in compare_weights.items():\n",
        "    Wlag = lag_weights(weights)\n",
        "    avg_net = Wlag.sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "    avg_gross = Wlag.abs().sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "    avg_dur = (Wlag * Dvec).sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "    r0, _, _, to = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(weights, ret_excess, dynamic_cost_bps)\n",
        "    r_eval = r0.loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    a10, b10, r2_10 = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, static10)\n",
        "    aew, bew, r2_ew = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, ewbasket)\n",
        "    v3_expo_rows.append({\n",
        "        \"strategy\": name,\n",
        "        \"avg_net_$\": avg_net,\n",
        "        \"avg_gross_$\": avg_gross,\n",
        "        \"avg_duration_exposure\": avg_dur,\n",
        "        \"ann_turnover\": to.loc[eval_start:].mean()*12,\n",
        "        \"alpha_vs_10Y_ann\": a10,\n",
        "        \"beta_vs_10Y\": b10,\n",
        "        \"R2_vs_10Y\": r2_10,\n",
        "        \"alpha_vs_EW_ann\": aew,\n",
        "        \"beta_vs_EW\": bew,\n",
        "        \"R2_vs_EW\": r2_ew,\n",
        "    })\n",
        "v3_expo = pd.DataFrame(v3_expo_rows).set_index(\"strategy\")\n",
        "v3_expo.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_exposure_diagnostics_dynamic_costs.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V3 exposure diagnostics\")\n",
        "display(v3_expo.loc[[idx for idx in v3_expo.index if idx.startswith(\"V3_\")]].sort_values(\"ann_turnover\").head(30))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V3 reading rules:\n",
            "1) If V3 controlled variants keep Sharpe/NW above E_10Y_timing after dynamic costs: sparse curve allocation is validated as an extension.\n",
            "2) If only G3 works gross but collapses after dynamic costs: short-hedge version remains too implementation-sensitive.\n",
            "3) If beta/R2 vs 10Y remain high: this is duration-risk-premium allocation, not pure RV. That is acceptable for the Track A claim.\n",
            "4) Pure residualized RV remains a separate, more stringent claim and should not be inferred from Track A.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 20. V3 attribution, plots and verdict table =====\n",
        "def attribution_dynamic_cost(weights, cost_bps_df):\n",
        "    Wlag = lag_weights(weights)\n",
        "    out = {}\n",
        "    for cname, cdf in comp.items():\n",
        "        out[cname] = (Wlag * cdf[weights.columns]).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    turnover_by_tenor = weights.diff().abs().fillna(weights.abs())\n",
        "    cbps = cost_bps_df.reindex(weights.index).ffill().bfill()[weights.columns]\n",
        "    out[\"cost\"] = -(turnover_by_tenor * (cbps/10000.0)).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    out[\"total\"] = sum(out[k] for k in [\"carry\", \"roll\", \"repricing\", \"convexity\", \"funding\"]) + out[\"cost\"]\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(out)\n",
        "\n",
        "v3_attr_rows = []\n",
        "for name, weights in compare_weights.items():\n",
        "    if not (name.startswith(\"V3_\") or name.startswith(\"G\")):\n",
        "        continue\n",
        "    A = attribution_dynamic_cost(weights, dynamic_cost_bps)\n",
        "    eval_A = A.loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "    row = {\"strategy\": name}\n",
        "    for col in [\"carry\", \"roll\", \"repricing\", \"convexity\", \"funding\", \"cost\", \"total\"]:\n",
        "        row[col + \"_ann\"] = eval_A[col].mean()*12\n",
        "    v3_attr_rows.append(row)\n",
        "v3_attr = pd.DataFrame(v3_attr_rows).set_index(\"strategy\")\n",
        "v3_attr.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_attribution_dynamic_costs.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V3 dynamic-cost attribution\")\n",
        "display(v3_attr.sort_values(\"total_ann\", ascending=False).head(30))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Compact verdict table: base V2 vs best V3 variants under dynamic costs.\n",
        "verdict_candidates = [idx for idx in v3_perf.index if idx.endswith(\"dynamicTC\")]\n",
        "verdict = v3_perf.loc[verdict_candidates].copy()\n",
        "verdict = verdict.join(v3_mean_tests.rename(columns={\"NW_t_mean\": \"NW_t\"}), how=\"left\")\n",
        "# flag V3 variants and baselines\n",
        "verdict[\"variant_type\"] = np.where(verdict.index.str.startswith(\"V3_\"), \"V3 controlled\", \"V2/base\")\n",
        "verdict.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_verdict_table.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"Verdict candidates: dynamic cost only\")\n",
        "display(verdict.sort_values([\"Sharpe\", \"NW_t\"], ascending=False).head(30))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot dynamic-cost performance of top V3 variants plus benchmarks.\n",
        "plot_names = [\"Static_10Y_excess\", \"EW_2_10Y_excess\"]\n",
        "if \"E_10Y_timing_dynamicTC\" in v3_returns:\n",
        "    plot_names.append(\"E_10Y_timing_dynamicTC\")\n",
        "top_v3 = verdict[verdict[\"variant_type\"].eq(\"V3 controlled\")].sort_values(\"Sharpe\", ascending=False).head(6).index.tolist()\n",
        "plot_names += top_v3\n",
        "ret_plot = pd.DataFrame({nm: v3_returns[nm] for nm in plot_names if nm in v3_returns}).loc[eval_start:].dropna(how=\"all\")\n",
        "wealth = (1 + ret_plot.fillna(0)).cumprod()\n",
        "wealth.plot(figsize=(12, 4.8), title=\"V3 sparse curve allocation: dynamic-cost performance\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"growth of $1 active return\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V3 reading rules:\")\n",
        "print(\"1) If V3 controlled variants keep Sharpe/NW above E_10Y_timing after dynamic costs: sparse curve allocation is validated as an extension.\")\n",
        "print(\"2) If only G3 works gross but collapses after dynamic costs: short-hedge version remains too implementation-sensitive.\")\n",
        "print(\"3) If beta/R2 vs 10Y remain high: this is duration-risk-premium allocation, not pure RV. That is acceptable for the Track A claim.\")\n",
        "print(\"4) Pure residualized RV remains a separate, more stringent claim and should not be inferred from Track A.\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 22,
      "id": "f7286834",

      },

          "text": [
            "Exported V3 outputs to: /content/macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 21. Export V3 weight and cost bundle =====\n",
        "for name, w in V3_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "    w.to_csv(OUT_DIR / f\"weights_{name}.csv\")\n",
        "dynamic_cost_bps.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_dynamic_cost_bps.csv\")\n",
        "v3_perf.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_performance.csv\")\n",
        "v3_mean_tests.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_nw_mean_tests.csv\")\n",
        "v3_expo.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_exposure.csv\")\n",
        "v3_attr.to_csv(OUT_DIR / \"v3_attribution.csv\")\n",
        "print(f\"Exported V3 outputs to: {OUT_DIR.resolve()}\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "id": "0b6a694d",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0b6a694d"
      },
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "## V4: pure RV search layer\n",
        "\n",
        "The V3 result should not be sold as yield-curve relative value. It is a strong sparse curve-allocation result, but it still carries meaningful duration-risk-premium exposure.\n",
        "\n",
        "V4 therefore adds a stricter RV layer:\n",
        "\n",
        "- cross-sectional and maturity-residual term-premium scores;\n",
        "- carry-aware relative scores;\n",
        "- DV01-neutral, net+DV01-neutral, PC1-neutral and PC1+PC2-neutral projected portfolios;\n",
        "- explicit butterfly trades;\n",
        "- dynamic transaction-cost evaluation using Corwin--Schultz and an Abdi--Ranaldo-style CHL estimator where ETF OHLC data are available;\n",
        "- fixed 10bp / 25bp one-way sensitivity as conservative checks.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 23,
      "id": "d6803e8b",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "d6803e8b",
        "outputId": "1db47138-621c-43d9-a54b-1cbf536ebeef"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V4 output directory: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v4_pure_rv_search\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 22. V4 settings: sparse consolidation + pure RV search =====\n",
        "V4_OUT_DIR = OUT_DIR / \"v4_pure_rv_search\"\n",
        "V4_OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Pure-RV portfolio construction controls.\n",
        "V4_GROSS = 1.0\n",
        "V4_RV_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD = 0.05       # minimum absolute residual score before a trade is allowed\n",
        "V4_SMOOTH_ALPHA = 0.35\n",
        "V4_NO_TRADE_BAND = 0.04\n",
        "V4_QUARTERLY_SMOOTH_ALPHA = 0.50\n",
        "V4_MAX_ABS_WEIGHT = 0.75            # clip extreme projected weights before gross normalization\n",
        "V4_PC_LOOKBACK = 60\n",
        "V4_MIN_OBS = 36\n",
        "\n",
        "# Dynamic cost models used in V4. Fixed costs are retained as conservative sensitivity checks.\n",
        "V4_FIXED_COSTS = [10.0, 25.0]\n",
        "print(\"V4 output directory:\", V4_OUT_DIR)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",

            "Latest V4 CS costs:\n"

 \"min\": \"2026-03-31 00:00:00\",\n        \"max\": \"2026-05-31 00:00:00\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"2026-03-31 00:00:00\",\n          \"2026-04-30 00:00:00\",\n          \"2026-05-31 00:00:00\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 2,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.2683511381256528,\n        \"min\": 4.312,\n        \"max\": 4.845,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          4.845,\n          4.633,\n          4.312\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 3,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.2683511381256528,\n        \"min\": 4.312,\n        \"max\": 4.845,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          4.845,\n          4.633,\n          4.312\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 5,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.5441038503815241,\n        \"min\": 1.424,\n        \"max\": 2.51,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          1.907,\n          1.424,\n          2.51\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 7,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 1.6500670693439505,\n        \"min\": 0.25,\n        \"max\": 3.108,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          3.108,\n          0.25\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 10,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 1.6500670693439505,\n        \"min\": 0.25,\n        \"max\": 3.108,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          3.108,\n          0.25\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"

        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 23. V4 transaction costs: Corwin--Schultz + Abdi--Ranaldo-style CHL estimator =====\n",
        "# V3 already builds `dynamic_cost_bps` from Corwin--Schultz ETF proxies.\n",
        "# V4 adds an Abdi--Ranaldo-style close-high-low spread proxy and lags all dynamic cost estimates by one month.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def abdi_ranaldo_chl_full_spread(high, low, close, window=21):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Abdi--Ranaldo-style close-high-low full-spread proxy.\n",
        "\n",
        "    Uses log close c_t and high-low midpoint eta_t = (h_t + l_t)/2. A rolling average of\n",
        "    (c_t - eta_t)(c_t - eta_{t+1}) is mapped to a proportional full-spread estimate.\n",
        "\n",
        "    This is intentionally used as a practical OHLC proxy on Treasury ETFs, not as a direct\n",
        "    transaction-cost estimate from constant-maturity yield series. Monthly costs are lagged\n",
        "    before backtesting to avoid using contemporaneous spread information.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    high = pd.Series(high).astype(float)\n",
        "    low = pd.Series(low).astype(float)\n",
        "    close = pd.Series(close).astype(float)\n",
        "    valid = (high > 0) & (low > 0) & (close > 0) & np.isfinite(high) & np.isfinite(low) & np.isfinite(close)\n",
        "    logh = np.log(high.where(valid))\n",
        "    logl = np.log(low.where(valid))\n",
        "    logc = np.log(close.where(valid))\n",
        "    eta = 0.5 * (logh + logl)\n",
        "    prod = (logc - eta) * (logc - eta.shift(-1))\n",
        "    s2 = 4.0 * prod.rolling(window, min_periods=max(5, window // 3)).mean()\n",
        "    s2 = s2.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).clip(lower=0.0)\n",
        "    full_spread = 2.0 * np.sqrt(s2)\n",
        "    return full_spread.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).clip(lower=0, upper=0.10)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_abdi_ranaldo_cost_bps(index, tenors=TENORS, proxy_map=TC_PROXY_TICKERS):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Build monthly one-way bps by tenor from ETF OHLC using a CHL spread proxy.\"\"\"\n",
        "    unique_tickers = sorted(set(proxy_map.values()))\n",
        "    ticker_monthly = {}\n",
        "    for tic in unique_tickers:\n",
        "        ohlc = fetch_yfinance_ohlc(tic, start=str(pd.Timestamp(index.min()).date()), end=str(pd.Timestamp(index.max()).date()))\n",
        "        if ohlc is None or not {\"High\", \"Low\", \"Close\"}.issubset(ohlc.columns):\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        full_spread = abdi_ranaldo_chl_full_spread(ohlc[\"High\"], ohlc[\"Low\"], ohlc[\"Close\"], window=21)\n",
        "        oneway_bps_daily = 0.5 * full_spread * 10000.0\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_daily.resample(\"ME\").median()\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_monthly.rolling(TC_ROLLING_MONTHS, min_periods=3).median()\n",
        "        oneway_bps_monthly = oneway_bps_monthly.clip(lower=TC_MIN_ONEWAY_BPS, upper=TC_MAX_ONEWAY_BPS)\n",
        "        ticker_monthly[tic] = oneway_bps_monthly\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not ticker_monthly:\n",
        "        return None, \"abdi_ranaldo_unavailable\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    out = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(index), columns=tenors, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for n in tenors:\n",
        "        tic = proxy_map[n]\n",
        "        ser = ticker_monthly.get(tic)\n",
        "        if ser is None:\n",
        "            out[n] = TC_FIXED_ONEWAY_BPS.get(n, 5.0)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            out[n] = ser.reindex(out.index, method=\"ffill\")\n",
        "    out = out.ffill().bfill()\n",
        "    out = out.clip(lower=TC_MIN_ONEWAY_BPS, upper=TC_MAX_ONEWAY_BPS)\n",
        "    return out, \"abdi_ranaldo_chl_etf_proxy_half_spread\"\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def fixed_cost_bps_frame(index, tenors=TENORS, bps=10.0):\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(float(bps), index=index, columns=tenors)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Lag dynamic costs by one month for V4 implementation testing.\n",
        "cs_cost_bps_v4 = dynamic_cost_bps.reindex(dates).ffill().bfill().shift(1).ffill().bfill()\n",
        "ar_cost_bps_raw, AR_COST_SOURCE = build_abdi_ranaldo_cost_bps(dates)\n",
        "if ar_cost_bps_raw is None:\n",
        "    ar_cost_bps_v4 = cs_cost_bps_v4.copy()\n",
        "    AR_COST_SOURCE = \"abdi_ranaldo_unavailable_fallback_to_corwin_schultz\"\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    ar_cost_bps_v4 = ar_cost_bps_raw.reindex(dates).ffill().bfill().shift(1).ffill().bfill()\n",
        "\n",
        "V4_COST_MODELS = {\n",
        "    \"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed25bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=25.0),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V4 cost models:\")\n",
        "print(\"- CS_lagged:\", COST_SOURCE, \"(lagged one month)\")\n",
        "print(\"- AR_lagged:\", AR_COST_SOURCE, \"(lagged one month where available)\")\n",
        "print(\"Latest V4 CS costs:\")\n",
        "display(cs_cost_bps_v4.tail(3).round(3))\n",
        "print(\"Latest V4 AR costs:\")\n",
        "display(ar_cost_bps_v4.tail(3).round(3))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

              "2026-05-31 0.1600 0.0560 -0.0770 -0.1030 -0.0350"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "\n",

              "</style>\n",
              "<table border=\"1\" class=\"dataframe\">\n",
              "  <thead>\n",
              "    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n",
              "      <th></th>\n",
              "      <th>2</th>\n",
              "      <th>3</th>\n",
              "      <th>5</th>\n",

\"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 5,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.22698127676088176,\n        \"min\": -0.737,\n        \"max\": -0.416,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.416,\n          -0.737\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 7,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.0,\n        \"min\": -0.674,\n        \"max\": -0.674,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.674\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": 10,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.11950104602052654,\n        \"min\": 0.0,\n        \"max\": 0.169,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.0\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 24. V4 relative-value score engineering =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def residualize_on_tenor_poly(df, degree=1):\n",
        "    \"\"\"For each date, remove a cross-sectional polynomial in maturity from a tenor score.\"\"\"\n",
        "    out = pd.DataFrame(index=df.index, columns=df.columns, dtype=float)\n",
        "    x = np.asarray(df.columns, dtype=float)\n",
        "    Xbase = np.column_stack([x**p for p in range(degree + 1)])\n",
        "    for dt, row in df.iterrows():\n",
        "        y = row.astype(float).values\n",
        "        m = np.isfinite(y)\n",
        "        if m.sum() < degree + 2:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        X = Xbase[m]\n",
        "        b = np.linalg.lstsq(X, y[m], rcond=None)[0]\n",
        "        res = np.full(len(y), np.nan)\n",
        "        res[m] = y[m] - X @ b\n",
        "        out.loc[dt, :] = res\n",
        "    return out.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def robust_xs_zscore(df):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Cross-sectional robust z-score by date.\"\"\"\n",
        "    med = df.median(axis=1)\n",
        "    mad = (df.sub(med, axis=0)).abs().median(axis=1).replace(0, np.nan)\n",
        "    z = df.sub(med, axis=0).div(1.4826 * mad, axis=0)\n",
        "    return z.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).clip(lower=-5, upper=5)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Forecasts are put on a comparable expanding-z scale before cross-sectional operations.\n",
        "forecast_z = expanding_z_df(forecast_er[TENORS])\n",
        "carry_z_v4 = cross_sectional_demean(expanding_z_df(carry_roll_fcst[TENORS]))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Candidate relative-value scores. Positive = candidate long leg; negative = candidate short leg.\n",
        "V4_RV_SCORES = {\n",
        "    \"tp_xs\": cross_sectional_demean(tp_z[TENORS]),\n",
        "    \"tp_resid_linear_maturity\": residualize_on_tenor_poly(tp_z[TENORS], degree=1),\n",
        "    \"tp_resid_quadratic_maturity\": residualize_on_tenor_poly(tp_z[TENORS], degree=2),\n",
        "    \"forecast_xs\": cross_sectional_demean(forecast_z[TENORS]),\n",
        "    \"forecast_resid_linear_maturity\": residualize_on_tenor_poly(forecast_z[TENORS], degree=1),\n",
        "    \"tp_linear_plus_carry\": residualize_on_tenor_poly(tp_z[TENORS], degree=1) + CARRY_WEIGHT * carry_z_v4,\n",
        "    \"forecast_linear_plus_carry\": residualize_on_tenor_poly(forecast_z[TENORS], degree=1) + CARRY_WEIGHT * carry_z_v4,\n",
        "    \"robust_tp_xs\": robust_xs_zscore(tp_z[TENORS]),\n",
        "}\n",
        "V4_RV_SCORES = {k: v.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan) for k, v in V4_RV_SCORES.items()}\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V4 RV score previews:\")\n",
        "for k, v in V4_RV_SCORES.items():\n",
        "    print(k)\n",
        "    display(v.dropna(how=\"all\").tail(2).round(3))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

\"V4_forecast_linear_plus_carry_proj_net_pc1_smooth\",\n          \"V4_forecast_xs_proj_pc12_smooth\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n \"num_unique_values\": 13,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.9674,\n          0.9785,\n          0.9381\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"avg_net\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.07741004694754457,\n        \"min\": -0.1916,\n        \"max\": 0.0002,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 9,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.1916,\n          0.0001,\n          -0.0241\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"avg_duration\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.11214178748352462,\n        \"min\": -0.2814,\n        \"max\": 0.0005,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 14,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.2776,\n          -0.1499,\n          0.0\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"ann_turnover\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.04024008344660176,\n        \"min\": 0.1592,\n        \"max\": 0.2855,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 17,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.1592,\n          0.1661,\n          0.1937\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 25. V4 pure-RV portfolio constructors =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def pca_loadings_at(t, n_components=2, lookback=V4_PC_LOOKBACK):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Rolling PCA loadings of yield changes, interpolated to traded tenors.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if t < lookback + 1:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    dY_hist = curve.diff().iloc[t-lookback:t].dropna()\n",
        "    if len(dY_hist) < max(24, lookback // 2):\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    X = dY_hist[CURVE_MATS].values.astype(float)\n",
        "    X = X - X.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)\n",
        "    cov = np.cov(X, rowvar=False)\n",
        "    vals, vecs = np.linalg.eigh(cov)\n",
        "    order = np.argsort(vals)[::-1]\n",
        "    pcs = []\n",
        "    for j in order[:n_components]:\n",
        "        pc = vecs[:, j]\n",
        "        if len(pcs) == 0 and pc.mean() < 0:\n",
        "            pc = -pc\n",
        "        pcs.append(np.interp(TENORS, CURVE_MATS, pc))\n",
        "    return np.vstack(pcs)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def clip_and_normalize(w, gross=V4_GROSS, max_abs=V4_MAX_ABS_WEIGHT):\n",
        "    w = np.asarray(w, float)\n",
        "    w = np.where(np.isfinite(w), w, 0.0)\n",
        "    if max_abs is not None:\n",
        "        w = np.clip(w, -max_abs, max_abs)\n",
        "    g = np.sum(np.abs(w))\n",
        "    if g <= 1e-12:\n",
        "        return np.zeros_like(w)\n",
        "    return w / g * gross\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def project_to_nullspace(v, constraints, gross=V4_GROSS):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Project signal vector v onto the nullspace of the supplied constraint rows, then gross-normalize.\"\"\"\n",
        "    v = np.asarray(v, float)\n",
        "    v = np.where(np.isfinite(v), v, 0.0)\n",
        "    if np.sum(np.abs(v)) <= 1e-12:\n",
        "        return np.zeros_like(v)\n",
        "    A = []\n",
        "    for c in constraints:\n",
        "        c = np.asarray(c, float)\n",
        "        if np.isfinite(c).all() and np.linalg.norm(c) > 1e-12:\n",
        "            A.append(c)\n",
        "    if A:\n",
        "        A = np.vstack(A)\n",
        "        v = v - A.T @ np.linalg.pinv(A @ A.T) @ (A @ v)\n",
        "    return clip_and_normalize(v, gross=gross)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def constraints_for_mode(t_pos, mode):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Constraint rows for pure RV tests.\"\"\"\n",
        "    D = np.asarray(TENORS, float)\n",
        "    ones = np.ones(len(D))\n",
        "    if mode == \"dv01\":\n",
        "        return [D]\n",
        "    if mode == \"net_dv01\":\n",
        "        return [ones, D]\n",
        "    pcs = pca_loadings_at(t_pos, n_components=2)\n",
        "    if pcs is None:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    # Approximate return exposure to a PC yield shock: -duration * yield-PC loading.\n",
        "    pc1_ret = -D * pcs[0]\n",
        "    if mode == \"pc1\":\n",
        "        return [pc1_ret]\n",
        "    if mode == \"net_pc1\":\n",
        "        return [ones, pc1_ret]\n",
        "    pc2_ret = -D * pcs[1]\n",
        "    if mode == \"pc12\":\n",
        "        return [pc1_ret, pc2_ret]\n",
        "    if mode == \"net_pc12\":\n",
        "        return [ones, pc1_ret, pc2_ret]\n",
        "    raise ValueError(mode)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def weights_projected_score(score_df, constraint_mode=\"net_dv01\", gross=V4_GROSS, threshold=V4_RV_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD):\n",
        "    W = pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=score_df.index, columns=score_df.columns)\n",
        "    for i, (dt, row) in enumerate(score_df.iterrows()):\n",
        "        x = row.astype(float).values\n",
        "        if np.isfinite(x).sum() < 3 or np.nanmax(np.abs(x)) < threshold:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        constraints = constraints_for_mode(i, constraint_mode)\n",
        "        if constraints is None:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        w = project_to_nullspace(x, constraints, gross=gross)\n",
        "        W.loc[dt, :] = w\n",
        "    return W\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def weights_pair_dv01_from_score(score_df, gross=V4_GROSS, threshold=V4_RV_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Long highest residual score / short lowest residual score, DV01-neutral, gross-normalized.\"\"\"\n",
        "    W = pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=score_df.index, columns=score_df.columns)\n",
        "    D = pd.Series(TENORS, index=score_df.columns, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for dt, row in score_df.iterrows():\n",
        "        x = row.astype(float).dropna()\n",
        "        if len(x) < 2 or (x.max() - x.min()) < threshold:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        L, S = x.idxmax(), x.idxmin()\n",
        "        dL, dS = float(D.loc[L]), float(D.loc[S])\n",
        "        wL = gross * dS / (dL + dS)\n",
        "        wS = -gross * dL / (dL + dS)\n",
        "        W.loc[dt, L] = wL\n",
        "        W.loc[dt, S] = wS\n",
        "    return W\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def weights_top2_bottom2_projected(score_df, constraint_mode=\"net_dv01\", gross=V4_GROSS, threshold=V4_RV_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD):\n",
        "    W = pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=score_df.index, columns=score_df.columns)\n",
        "    for i, (dt, row) in enumerate(score_df.iterrows()):\n",
        "        x = row.astype(float).dropna()\n",
        "        if len(x) < 4 or (x.max() - x.min()) < threshold:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        raw = pd.Series(0.0, index=score_df.columns)\n",
        "        raw[x.nlargest(2).index] = +0.25 * gross\n",
        "        raw[x.nsmallest(2).index] = -0.25 * gross\n",
        "        constraints = constraints_for_mode(i, constraint_mode)\n",
        "        if constraints is None:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        W.loc[dt, :] = project_to_nullspace(raw.values, constraints, gross=gross)\n",
        "    return W\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def butterfly_from_triplet(left, belly, right, belly_sign=1.0, gross=V4_GROSS):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Net- and duration-neutral butterfly with chosen belly sign.\"\"\"\n",
        "    mats = np.asarray([left, belly, right], float)\n",
        "    w_b = float(belly_sign)\n",
        "    A = np.array([[1.0, 1.0], [left, right]], dtype=float)\n",
        "    b = np.array([-w_b, -belly * w_b], dtype=float)\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        w_l, w_r = np.linalg.solve(A, b)\n",
        "    except np.linalg.LinAlgError:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    w = np.zeros(len(TENORS), dtype=float)\n",
        "    loc = {n: j for j, n in enumerate(TENORS)}\n",
        "    w[loc[left]] = w_l\n",
        "    w[loc[belly]] = w_b\n",
        "    w[loc[right]] = w_r\n",
        "    return clip_and_normalize(w, gross=gross, max_abs=None)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def weights_best_butterfly(score_df, gross=V4_GROSS, threshold=V4_RV_SIGNAL_THRESHOLD):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Pick the strongest residual butterfly dislocation each month.\n",
        "\n",
        "    For every left-belly-right triplet, compare belly score to linear interpolation of wing scores.\n",
        "    Positive dislocation means long belly / short wings; negative means short belly / long wings.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    W = pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=score_df.index, columns=score_df.columns)\n",
        "    triples = []\n",
        "    tns = list(TENORS)\n",
        "    for a in range(len(tns)-2):\n",
        "        for b in range(a+1, len(tns)-1):\n",
        "            for c in range(b+1, len(tns)):\n",
        "                triples.append((tns[a], tns[b], tns[c]))\n",
        "    for dt, row in score_df.iterrows():\n",
        "        x = row.astype(float)\n",
        "        best = None\n",
        "        best_abs = -np.inf\n",
        "        for left, belly, right in triples:\n",
        "            vals = x[[left, belly, right]]\n",
        "            if vals.isna().any():\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            wing_interp = vals[left] + (vals[right] - vals[left]) * ((belly - left) / (right - left))\n",
        "            disloc = float(vals[belly] - wing_interp)\n",
        "            if abs(disloc) > best_abs:\n",
        "                best_abs = abs(disloc)\n",
        "                best = (left, belly, right, np.sign(disloc))\n",
        "        if best is None or best_abs < threshold:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        w = butterfly_from_triplet(best[0], best[1], best[2], belly_sign=best[3], gross=gross)\n",
        "        if w is not None:\n",
        "            W.loc[dt, :] = w\n",
        "    return W\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def implement_rv_weight_variants(W0, prefix):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Raw + smoother implementation variants for a pure RV target portfolio.\"\"\"\n",
        "    out = {}\n",
        "    out[f\"{prefix}_raw\"] = W0.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "    out[f\"{prefix}_smooth\"] = smooth_weights(W0, alpha=V4_SMOOTH_ALPHA, no_trade_band=V4_NO_TRADE_BAND)\n",
        "    Wq = quarterly_rebalance_targets(W0)\n",
        "    out[f\"{prefix}_quarterly_smooth\"] = smooth_weights(Wq, alpha=V4_QUARTERLY_SMOOTH_ALPHA, no_trade_band=V4_NO_TRADE_BAND)\n",
        "    return out\n",
        "\n",
        "# Build V4 pure-RV portfolios across scores and constructors.\n",
        "V4_RV_WEIGHTS = {}\n",
        "for score_name, S in V4_RV_SCORES.items():\n",
        "    constructors = {\n",
        "        \"pair_dv01\": weights_pair_dv01_from_score(S),\n",
        "        \"top2_net_dv01\": weights_top2_bottom2_projected(S, constraint_mode=\"net_dv01\"),\n",
        "        \"proj_dv01\": weights_projected_score(S, constraint_mode=\"dv01\"),\n",
        "        \"proj_net_dv01\": weights_projected_score(S, constraint_mode=\"net_dv01\"),\n",
        "        \"proj_pc1\": weights_projected_score(S, constraint_mode=\"pc1\"),\n",
        "        \"proj_net_pc1\": weights_projected_score(S, constraint_mode=\"net_pc1\"),\n",
        "        \"proj_pc12\": weights_projected_score(S, constraint_mode=\"pc12\"),\n",
        "        \"butterfly\": weights_best_butterfly(S),\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    for cons_name, W0 in constructors.items():\n",
        "        base_name = f\"V4_{score_name}_{cons_name}\"\n",
        "        V4_RV_WEIGHTS.update(implement_rv_weight_variants(W0, base_name))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Constructed V4 pure-RV variants:\", len(V4_RV_WEIGHTS))\n",
        "summary_rows = []\n",
        "for name, W0 in V4_RV_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "    w_eval = W0.loc[eval_start:] if \"eval_start\" in globals() else W0\n",
        "    summary_rows.append({\n",
        "        \"strategy\": name,\n",
        "        \"avg_gross\": W0.abs().sum(1).replace(0, np.nan).mean(),\n",
        "        \"avg_net\": W0.sum(1).replace(0, np.nan).mean(),\n",
        "        \"avg_duration\": (W0 * pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS)).sum(1).replace(0, np.nan).mean(),\n",
        "        \"ann_turnover\": w_eval.diff().abs().sum(1).mean() * 12,\n",
        "    })\n",
        "v4_weight_summary = pd.DataFrame(summary_rows).set_index(\"strategy\")\n",
        "v4_weight_summary.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_weight_summary.csv\")\n",
        "display(v4_weight_summary.sort_values(\"ann_turnover\").head(20).round(4))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 26. V4 evaluation: pure RV success gates =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def evaluate_weights_under_cost_models(weights_dict, cost_models, ret_excess_df, eval_start):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    returns = {}\n",
        "    turnovers = {}\n",
        "    for cost_name, cost_df in cost_models.items():\n",
        "        for name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "            r_net, r_gross, cost, to = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(W0, ret_excess_df, cost_df)\n",
        "            nm = f\"{name}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "            row = perf_stats(r_net.loc[eval_start:], turnover=to.loc[eval_start:], name=nm)\n",
        "            row[\"base_strategy\"] = name\n",
        "            row[\"cost_model\"] = cost_name\n",
        "            row[\"avg_cost_bps_ann\"] = cost.loc[eval_start:].mean() * 12 * 10000\n",
        "            rows.append(row)\n",
        "            returns[nm] = r_net\n",
        "            turnovers[nm] = to\n",
        "    perf_df = pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\")\n",
        "    return perf_df, returns, turnovers\n",
        "\n",
        "# Reference set from V3 sparse allocation for comparison, not for RV claims.\n",
        "V4_SPARSE_REFERENCES = {}\n",
        "for k in [\n",
        "    \"E_10Y_timing\",\n",
        "    \"V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_cost_hurdle\",\n",
        "    \"V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_cost_hurdle\",\n",
        "    \"V3_G4_core_tail_es_cost_hurdle\",\n",
        "    \"V3_G3_core_short_dv01_cost_hurdle\",\n",
        "]:\n",
        "    if k in compare_weights:\n",
        "        V4_SPARSE_REFERENCES[k] = compare_weights[k]\n",
        "    elif k in V3_WEIGHTS:\n",
        "        V4_SPARSE_REFERENCES[k] = V3_WEIGHTS[k]\n",
        "\n",
        "v4_perf_rv, v4_returns_rv, v4_turnover_rv = evaluate_weights_under_cost_models(\n",
        "    V4_RV_WEIGHTS, V4_COST_MODELS, ret_excess, eval_start\n",
        ")\n",
        "v4_perf_ref, v4_returns_ref, v4_turnover_ref = evaluate_weights_under_cost_models(\n",
        "    V4_SPARSE_REFERENCES, {\"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4, \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0)}, ret_excess, eval_start\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Newey-West tests.\n",
        "def add_nw_tests(perf_df, returns_dict):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    for nm, r in returns_dict.items():\n",
        "        ann_mean, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(r.loc[eval_start:], lag=12)\n",
        "        rows.append({\"name\": nm, \"ann_mean_NW\": ann_mean, \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t})\n",
        "    nw = pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\")\n",
        "    return perf_df.join(nw, how=\"left\")\n",
        "\n",
        "v4_perf_rv = add_nw_tests(v4_perf_rv, v4_returns_rv)\n",
        "v4_perf_ref = add_nw_tests(v4_perf_ref, v4_returns_ref)\n",
        "\n",
        "v4_perf_rv.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_pure_rv_performance_all_cost_models.csv\")\n",
        "v4_perf_ref.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_sparse_reference_performance.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V4 sparse references, for context only:\")\n",
        "display(v4_perf_ref.sort_values(\"Sharpe\", ascending=False).head(20).round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V4 pure-RV candidates, sorted by Sharpe:\")\n",
        "display(v4_perf_rv.sort_values(\"Sharpe\", ascending=False).head(40).round(4))\n"
      ]
    },

        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Gate interpretation:\n",
            "- Pass = genuine candidate for a separate pure curve-RV repo.\n",
            "- High Sharpe but high beta/R2 = sparse duration allocation, not RV.\n",
            "- Low beta but weak NW/return = neutralization works, but no proven residual value.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 27. V4 exposure diagnostics and strict RV gates =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def exposure_diagnostics_for_named_returns(weights_dict, returns_dict, cost_suffix=\"CS_lagged\"):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    static10 = ret_excess[10].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    ewbasket = ret_excess[TENORS].mean(1).loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for base_name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        nm = f\"{base_name}_{cost_suffix}\"\n",
        "        if nm not in returns_dict:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        Wlag = lag_weights(W0)\n",
        "        avg_net = Wlag.sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "        avg_gross = Wlag.abs().sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "        avg_dur = (Wlag * Dvec).sum(1).loc[eval_start:].mean()\n",
        "        r_eval = returns_dict[nm].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "        a10, b10, r2_10 = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, static10)\n",
        "        aew, bew, r2_ew = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, ewbasket)\n",
        "        rows.append({\n",
        "            \"name\": nm,\n",
        "            \"base_strategy\": base_name,\n",
        "            \"avg_net_$\": avg_net,\n",
        "            \"avg_gross_$\": avg_gross,\n",
        "            \"avg_duration_exposure\": avg_dur,\n",
        "            \"alpha_vs_10Y_ann\": a10,\n",
        "            \"beta_vs_10Y\": b10,\n",
        "            \"R2_vs_10Y\": r2_10,\n",
        "            \"alpha_vs_EW_ann\": aew,\n",
        "            \"beta_vs_EW\": bew,\n",
        "            \"R2_vs_EW\": r2_ew,\n",
        "        })\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\")\n",
        "\n",
        "v4_expo_rv_cs = exposure_diagnostics_for_named_returns(V4_RV_WEIGHTS, v4_returns_rv, cost_suffix=\"CS_lagged\")\n",
        "v4_expo_rv_cs.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_pure_rv_exposure_diagnostics_cs_lagged.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Merge CS-lagged performance and exposure for pure RV gatekeeping.\n",
        "v4_cs = v4_perf_rv[v4_perf_rv[\"cost_model\"].eq(\"CS_lagged\")].join(v4_expo_rv_cs, how=\"left\", rsuffix=\"_expo\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Strict but not impossible pure-RV gate. This is a filter, not a claim of final validity.\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_positive_net\"] = v4_cs[\"ann_ret\"] > 0\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_sharpe\"] = v4_cs[\"Sharpe\"] > 0.25\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_nw\"] = v4_cs[\"NW_t_mean\"] > 1.60\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_low_beta_10Y\"] = v4_cs[\"beta_vs_10Y\"].abs() < 0.15\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_low_R2_10Y\"] = v4_cs[\"R2_vs_10Y\"] < 0.20\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_duration_neutral\"] = v4_cs[\"avg_duration_exposure\"].abs() < 0.35\n",
        "v4_cs[\"pass_turnover\"] = v4_cs[\"ann_turnover\"] < 4.0\n",
        "pass_cols = [c for c in v4_cs.columns if c.startswith(\"pass_\")]\n",
        "v4_cs[\"rv_gate_score\"] = v4_cs[pass_cols].sum(axis=1)\n",
        "v4_cs[\"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\"] = v4_cs[pass_cols].all(axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "v4_cs.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_pure_rv_gate_table_cs_lagged.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Strict pure-RV gate candidates, sorted by gate score then Sharpe:\")\n",
        "show_cols = [\n",
        "    \"base_strategy\", \"ann_ret\", \"ann_vol\", \"Sharpe\", \"MaxDD\", \"ann_turnover\", \"NW_t_mean\",\n",
        "    \"avg_duration_exposure\", \"beta_vs_10Y\", \"R2_vs_10Y\", \"rv_gate_score\", \"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\"\n",
        "]\n",
        "display(v4_cs[show_cols].sort_values([\"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\", \"rv_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(40).round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Gate interpretation:\")\n",
        "print(\"- Pass = genuine candidate for a separate pure curve-RV repo.\")\n",
        "print(\"- High Sharpe but high beta/R2 = sparse duration allocation, not RV.\")\n",
        "print(\"- Low beta but weak NW/return = neutralization works, but no proven residual value.\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {

          "output_type": "stream",

          "text": [
            "Exported V4 outputs to: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v4_pure_rv_search\n",
            "V4 reading rules:\n",
            "1) If no strategy passes the strict RV gate, do not spin out a pure RV repo yet.\n",
            "2) If a strategy passes with low beta/R2 and positive NW evidence, it becomes a candidate for macroanchor-curve-relative-value.\n",
            "3) Sparse allocation remains a separate Track A claim and should not be relabelled as relative value.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 28. V4 attribution, plots and export bundle =====\n",
        "# Attribution for top CS-lagged pure-RV candidates and sparse references.\n",
        "\n",
        "def attribution_with_cost_model(weights, cost_bps_df):\n",
        "    Wlag = lag_weights(weights)\n",
        "    out = {}\n",
        "    for cname, cdf in comp.items():\n",
        "        out[cname] = (Wlag * cdf[weights.columns]).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    turnover_by_tenor = weights.diff().abs().fillna(weights.abs())\n",
        "    cbps = cost_bps_df.reindex(weights.index).ffill().bfill()[weights.columns]\n",
        "    out[\"cost\"] = -(turnover_by_tenor * (cbps / 10000.0)).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "    out[\"total\"] = sum(out[k] for k in [\"carry\", \"roll\", \"repricing\", \"convexity\", \"funding\"]) + out[\"cost\"]\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(out)\n",
        "\n",
        "top_rv_names = v4_cs.sort_values([\"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\", \"rv_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(12)[\"base_strategy\"].tolist()\n",
        "attr_rows = []\n",
        "for name in top_rv_names:\n",
        "    W0 = V4_RV_WEIGHTS[name]\n",
        "    A = attribution_with_cost_model(W0, cs_cost_bps_v4).loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "    row = {\"strategy\": name}\n",
        "    for col in [\"carry\", \"roll\", \"repricing\", \"convexity\", \"funding\", \"cost\", \"total\"]:\n",
        "        row[col + \"_ann\"] = A[col].mean() * 12\n",
        "    attr_rows.append(row)\n",
        "v4_rv_attr = pd.DataFrame(attr_rows).set_index(\"strategy\") if attr_rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "v4_rv_attr.to_csv(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_top_pure_rv_attribution_cs_lagged.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V4 top pure-RV attribution, CS-lagged costs:\")\n",
        "display(v4_rv_attr.round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot top pure RV candidates against sparse allocation reference and 10Y timing.\n",
        "plot_ret = {}\n",
        "for nm in [\"E_10Y_timing_CS_lagged\", \"V3_G1_sparse_core_vol_cost_hurdle_CS_lagged\", \"V3_G2_sparse_core_dv01_cost_hurdle_CS_lagged\"]:\n",
        "    if nm in v4_returns_ref:\n",
        "        plot_ret[nm] = v4_returns_ref[nm]\n",
        "for base in top_rv_names[:6]:\n",
        "    nm = f\"{base}_CS_lagged\"\n",
        "    if nm in v4_returns_rv:\n",
        "        plot_ret[nm] = v4_returns_rv[nm]\n",
        "\n",
        "if plot_ret:\n",
        "    rp = pd.DataFrame(plot_ret).loc[eval_start:].dropna(how=\"all\")\n",
        "    wealth = (1 + rp.fillna(0)).cumprod()\n",
        "    wealth.plot(figsize=(13, 5), title=\"V4: sparse allocation reference vs pure RV candidates, CS-lagged costs\")\n",
        "    plt.ylabel(\"growth of $1 active return\")\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Save compact artifacts.\n",
        "for name, W0 in list(V4_RV_WEIGHTS.items())[:]:\n",
        "    # Keep individual weight files only for top candidates to avoid creating hundreds of files.\n",
        "    pass\n",
        "\n",
        "best_names = v4_cs.sort_values([\"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\", \"rv_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(20)[\"base_strategy\"].tolist()\n",
        "with pd.ExcelWriter(V4_OUT_DIR / \"v4_top_pure_rv_weights.xlsx\") as writer:\n",
        "    for name in best_names:\n",
        "        safe_name = name[:31].replace(\"/\", \"_\")\n",
        "        V4_RV_WEIGHTS[name].to_excel(writer, sheet_name=safe_name)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Exported V4 outputs to:\", V4_OUT_DIR)\n",
        "print(\"V4 reading rules:\")\n",
        "print(\"1) If no strategy passes the strict RV gate, do not spin out a pure RV repo yet.\")\n",
        "print(\"2) If a strategy passes with low beta/R2 and positive NW evidence, it becomes a candidate for macroanchor-curve-relative-value.\")\n",
        "print(\"3) Sparse allocation remains a separate Track A claim and should not be relabelled as relative value.\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "id": "1e73d86f",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "1e73d86f"
      },
      "source": [
        "## V5: pure-RV robustness layer\n",
        "\n",
        "V4 found low-beta, duration-neutral RV candidates, especially quadratic-maturity residual butterflies. V5 asks whether those candidates survive stricter validation:\n",
        "\n",
        "1. multi-cost robustness: Corwin--Schultz, Abdi--Ranaldo, fixed 2.5/5/10/25 bps one-way;\n",
        "2. subperiod stability;\n",
        "3. risk-budget scaling with ex-ante volatility targeting;\n",
        "4. leg/weight diagnostics;\n",
        "5. a stricter spin-off gate for a possible `macroanchor-curve-relative-value` repo.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 30,
      "id": "3b24be2a",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "3b24be2a",
        "outputId": "53864872-ed04-48a3-879d-12a70554b56d"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V5 output directory: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v5_pure_rv_robustness\n",
            "V5 candidate strategies: 20\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc1_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc12_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_pc1_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_top2_net_dv01_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_top2_net_dv01_raw\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc1_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc1_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_pc1_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_pc1_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc12_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc12_smooth\n",
            "V5 cost models: ['CS_lagged', 'AR_lagged', 'Fixed2p5bp', 'Fixed5bp', 'Fixed10bp', 'Fixed25bp']\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 29. V5 settings: multi-cost, subperiods, shortlisted pure-RV candidates =====\n",
        "V5_OUT_DIR = OUT_DIR / \"v5_pure_rv_robustness\"\n",
        "V5_OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# V5 cost grid. Dynamic estimates are lagged one month already in V4.\n",
        "V5_COST_MODELS = {\n",
        "    \"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"Fixed2p5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=2.5),\n",
        "    \"Fixed5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=5.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed25bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=25.0),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# Candidate shortlist: prefer strategies that passed the V4 strict gate; otherwise take top quadratic-residual names.\n",
        "if \"v4_cs\" in globals() and len(v4_cs) > 0:\n",
        "    _pass = v4_cs[v4_cs.get(\"passes_strict_pure_rv_gate\", False).astype(bool)].copy()\n",
        "    if len(_pass) > 0:\n",
        "        V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES = _pass.sort_values(\"Sharpe\", ascending=False)[\"base_strategy\"].drop_duplicates().head(20).tolist()\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES = v4_cs.sort_values([\"rv_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False)[\"base_strategy\"].drop_duplicates().head(20).tolist()\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES = []\n",
        "\n",
        "# Force-include the economically interpretable V4 candidates discussed in the V4 reading.\n",
        "V5_FORCE_INCLUDE = [\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarterly_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_raw\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_raw\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_pc1_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc12_smooth\",\n",
        "]\n",
        "for nm in V5_FORCE_INCLUDE:\n",
        "    if nm in V4_RV_WEIGHTS and nm not in V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES:\n",
        "        V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES.append(nm)\n",
        "V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES = [nm for nm in V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES if nm in V4_RV_WEIGHTS]\n",
        "\n",
        "V5_RV_WEIGHTS = {nm: V4_RV_WEIGHTS[nm] for nm in V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES}\n",
        "\n",
        "# Subperiods. Bounds are clipped automatically to available eval sample.\n",
        "V5_SUBPERIODS = {\n",
        "    \"full\": (eval_start, dates.max()),\n",
        "    \"pre_GFC\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2000-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2007-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"GFC_ZLB\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2008-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2014-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"normalization\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2015-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2019-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"covid_inflation\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2020-01-31\"), dates.max()),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 output directory:\", V5_OUT_DIR)\n",
        "print(\"V5 candidate strategies:\", len(V5_RV_WEIGHTS))\n",
        "for nm in V5_CANDIDATE_NAMES[:25]:\n",
        "    print(\"-\", nm)\n",
        "print(\"V5 cost models:\", list(V5_COST_MODELS.keys()))\n"
      ]
    },
