      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 30. V5 multi-cost performance, exposures and robust gates =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def eval_named_weights_multi_cost(weights_dict, cost_models, ret_excess_df, eval_start):\n",
        "    rows, returns, gross_returns, costs, turnovers = [], {}, {}, {}, {}\n",
        "    for cost_name, cost_df in cost_models.items():\n",
        "        for base_name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "            r_net, r_gross, c, to = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(W0, ret_excess_df, cost_df)\n",
        "            nm = f\"{base_name}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "            row = perf_stats(r_net.loc[eval_start:], turnover=to.loc[eval_start:], name=nm)\n",
        "            ann_mean, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(r_net.loc[eval_start:], lag=12)\n",
        "            row.update({\n",
        "                \"base_strategy\": base_name,\n",
        "                \"cost_model\": cost_name,\n",
        "                \"ann_mean_NW\": ann_mean,\n",
        "                \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t,\n",
        "                \"avg_cost_bps_ann\": c.loc[eval_start:].mean() * 12 * 10000,\n",
        "            })\n",
        "            rows.append(row)\n",
        "            returns[nm] = r_net\n",
        "            gross_returns[nm] = r_gross\n",
        "            costs[nm] = c\n",
        "            turnovers[nm] = to\n",
        "    perf = pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "    return perf, returns, gross_returns, costs, turnovers\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def exposure_for_weight_return_pairs(weights_dict, returns_dict, cost_models, eval_start):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    static10 = ret_excess[10].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    ewbasket = ret_excess[TENORS].mean(1).loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "    Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for cost_name in cost_models.keys():\n",
        "        for base_name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "            nm = f\"{base_name}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "            if nm not in returns_dict:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            Wlag = lag_weights(W0)\n",
        "            w_eval = Wlag.loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "            r_eval = returns_dict[nm].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "            a10, b10, r2_10 = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, static10)\n",
        "            aew, bew, r2_ew = ols_beta_alpha(r_eval, ewbasket)\n",
        "            rows.append({\n",
        "                \"name\": nm,\n",
        "                \"base_strategy\": base_name,\n",
        "                \"cost_model\": cost_name,\n",
        "                \"avg_net_$\": w_eval.sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "                \"avg_gross_$\": w_eval.abs().sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "                \"avg_duration_exposure\": (w_eval * Dvec).sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "                \"abs_duration_exposure_mean\": (w_eval * Dvec).sum(axis=1).abs().mean(),\n",
        "                \"avg_active_legs\": (w_eval.abs() > 1e-8).sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "                \"alpha_vs_10Y_ann\": a10,\n",
        "                \"beta_vs_10Y\": b10,\n",
        "                \"R2_vs_10Y\": r2_10,\n",
        "                \"alpha_vs_EW_ann\": aew,\n",
        "                \"beta_vs_EW\": bew,\n",
        "                \"R2_vs_EW\": r2_ew,\n",
        "            })\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_perf, v5_returns, v5_gross_returns, v5_costs, v5_turnovers = eval_named_weights_multi_cost(\n",
        "    V5_RV_WEIGHTS, V5_COST_MODELS, ret_excess, eval_start\n",
        ")\n",
        "v5_expo = exposure_for_weight_return_pairs(V5_RV_WEIGHTS, v5_returns, V5_COST_MODELS, eval_start)\n",
        "v5_all = v5_perf.join(v5_expo.drop(columns=[\"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\"], errors=\"ignore\"), how=\"left\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Gate per cost model. These are intentionally stricter than V4 because V5 is for spin-off evidence.\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_positive_net\"] = v5_all[\"ann_ret\"] > 0\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_sharpe\"] = v5_all[\"Sharpe\"] > 0.25\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_nw\"] = v5_all[\"NW_t_mean\"] > 1.60\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_low_beta_10Y\"] = v5_all[\"beta_vs_10Y\"].abs() < 0.10\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_low_R2_10Y\"] = v5_all[\"R2_vs_10Y\"] < 0.10\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_duration_neutral\"] = v5_all[\"avg_duration_exposure\"].abs() < 0.20\n",
        "v5_all[\"pass_turnover\"] = v5_all[\"ann_turnover\"] < 3.0\n",
        "pass_cols_v5 = [c for c in v5_all.columns if c.startswith(\"pass_\")]\n",
        "v5_all[\"v5_gate_score\"] = v5_all[pass_cols_v5].sum(axis=1)\n",
        "v5_all[\"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"] = v5_all[pass_cols_v5].all(axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_all.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_candidate_performance_exposure_all_costs.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 all-cost top rows by cost-specific gate score and Sharpe:\")\n",
        "show_cols = [\n",
        "    \"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\", \"ann_ret\", \"ann_vol\", \"Sharpe\", \"MaxDD\", \"ann_turnover\", \"NW_t_mean\",\n",
        "    \"avg_duration_exposure\", \"beta_vs_10Y\", \"R2_vs_10Y\", \"avg_cost_bps_ann\",\n",
        "    \"v5_gate_score\", \"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"\n",
        "]\n",
        "display(v5_all[show_cols].sort_values([\"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\", \"v5_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(60).round(4))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

      "execution_count": 32,
      "id": "ec02c328",

              "\n",

              "      <td>1</td>\n",
              "    </tr>\n",

      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 31. V5 cost-robustness summary by base strategy =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def summarize_cost_robustness(v5_table):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    required_cols = [\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\", \"Fixed10bp\"]\n",
        "    for base, g in v5_table.groupby(\"base_strategy\"):\n",
        "        gg = g.set_index(\"cost_model\")\n",
        "        row = {\"base_strategy\": base}\n",
        "        row[\"n_cost_models\"] = len(gg)\n",
        "        row[\"n_cost_passes\"] = int(gg[\"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"].sum())\n",
        "        row[\"n_positive_net\"] = int((gg[\"ann_ret\"] > 0).sum())\n",
        "        row[\"min_ann_ret\"] = gg[\"ann_ret\"].min()\n",
        "        row[\"min_sharpe\"] = gg[\"Sharpe\"].min()\n",
        "        row[\"min_NW_t\"] = gg[\"NW_t_mean\"].min()\n",
        "        row[\"max_abs_beta_10Y\"] = gg[\"beta_vs_10Y\"].abs().max()\n",
        "        row[\"max_R2_10Y\"] = gg[\"R2_vs_10Y\"].max()\n",
        "        row[\"max_abs_duration\"] = gg[\"avg_duration_exposure\"].abs().max()\n",
        "        row[\"max_turnover\"] = gg[\"ann_turnover\"].max()\n",
        "        row[\"passes_CS\"] = bool(gg.loc[\"CS_lagged\", \"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"]) if \"CS_lagged\" in gg.index else False\n",
        "        row[\"passes_AR\"] = bool(gg.loc[\"AR_lagged\", \"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"]) if \"AR_lagged\" in gg.index else False\n",
        "        row[\"passes_Fixed5\"] = bool(gg.loc[\"Fixed5bp\", \"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"]) if \"Fixed5bp\" in gg.index else False\n",
        "        row[\"passes_Fixed10\"] = bool(gg.loc[\"Fixed10bp\", \"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\"]) if \"Fixed10bp\" in gg.index else False\n",
        "        # Spin-off levels.\n",
        "        row[\"rv_candidate_level\"] = \"reject\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS\"] and row[\"passes_AR\"]:\n",
        "            row[\"rv_candidate_level\"] = \"strong_dynamic_cost_candidate\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS\"] and row[\"passes_AR\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed5\"]:\n",
        "            row[\"rv_candidate_level\"] = \"spin_off_candidate\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS\"] and row[\"passes_AR\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed5\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed10\"]:\n",
        "            row[\"rv_candidate_level\"] = \"robust_spin_off_candidate\"\n",
        "        rows.append(row)\n",
        "    out = pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"base_strategy\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "    return out.sort_values([\"rv_candidate_level\", \"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=[True, False, False])\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_cost_summary = summarize_cost_robustness(v5_all)\n",
        "v5_cost_summary.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_cost_robustness_by_strategy.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 cost robustness summary:\")\n",
        "display(v5_cost_summary.sort_values([\"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(40).round(4))\n",
        "print(\"Candidate level counts:\")\n",
        "display(v5_cost_summary[\"rv_candidate_level\"].value_counts())\n"
      ]
    },

              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-9168a0bc-59e3-4983-983c-c934d7598431');\n",

0.0023144254085520695,\n        \"min\": 0.0029,\n        \"max\": 0.011,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 39,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.0092\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n \"min\": 0.0501,\n        \"max\": 0.2462,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 51,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.1116\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n       "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 32. V5 subperiod robustness =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def _clip_period(start, end, available_index):\n",
        "    start = max(pd.Timestamp(start), pd.Timestamp(available_index.min()))\n",
        "    end = min(pd.Timestamp(end), pd.Timestamp(available_index.max()))\n",
        "    if start > end:\n",
        "        return None, None\n",
        "    return start, end\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def subperiod_perf_table(returns_dict, weights_dict, cost_model_name=\"CS_lagged\", min_months=24):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    static10_full = ret_excess[10]\n",
        "    Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for base_name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        nm = f\"{base_name}_{cost_model_name}\"\n",
        "        if nm not in returns_dict:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        r = returns_dict[nm]\n",
        "        Wlag = lag_weights(W0)\n",
        "        for pname, (s, e) in V5_SUBPERIODS.items():\n",
        "            s2, e2 = _clip_period(s, e, r.index)\n",
        "            if s2 is None:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            rr = r.loc[s2:e2].dropna()\n",
        "            if len(rr) < min_months:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            row = perf_stats(rr, turnover=None, name=f\"{base_name}_{cost_model_name}_{pname}\")\n",
        "            ann_mean, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(rr, lag=min(12, max(1, len(rr)//4)))\n",
        "            a10, b10, r2_10 = ols_beta_alpha(rr, static10_full.loc[rr.index])\n",
        "            row.update({\n",
        "                \"base_strategy\": base_name,\n",
        "                \"cost_model\": cost_model_name,\n",
        "                \"subperiod\": pname,\n",
        "                \"start\": rr.index.min(),\n",
        "                \"end\": rr.index.max(),\n",
        "                \"n_months\": len(rr),\n",
        "                \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t,\n",
        "                \"beta_vs_10Y\": b10,\n",
        "                \"R2_vs_10Y\": r2_10,\n",
        "                \"avg_duration_exposure\": (Wlag.loc[rr.index] * Dvec).sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "            })\n",
        "            rows.append(row)\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_sub_cs = subperiod_perf_table(v5_returns, V5_RV_WEIGHTS, cost_model_name=\"CS_lagged\")\n",
        "v5_sub_ar = subperiod_perf_table(v5_returns, V5_RV_WEIGHTS, cost_model_name=\"AR_lagged\")\n",
        "v5_sub_f5 = subperiod_perf_table(v5_returns, V5_RV_WEIGHTS, cost_model_name=\"Fixed5bp\")\n",
        "v5_subperiods = pd.concat([v5_sub_cs, v5_sub_ar, v5_sub_f5], axis=0)\n",
        "v5_subperiods.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_subperiod_robustness_cs_ar_fixed5.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Compact stability summary: count positive subperiods and positive Sharpe subperiods.\n",
        "if len(v5_subperiods) > 0:\n",
        "    v5_sub_summary = v5_subperiods.groupby([\"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\"]).agg(\n",
        "        n_subperiods=(\"subperiod\", \"count\"),\n",
        "        n_positive_ret=(\"ann_ret\", lambda x: int((x > 0).sum())),\n",
        "        n_positive_sharpe=(\"Sharpe\", lambda x: int((x > 0).sum())),\n",
        "        min_subperiod_ret=(\"ann_ret\", \"min\"),\n",
        "        min_subperiod_sharpe=(\"Sharpe\", \"min\"),\n",
        "        max_abs_beta_10Y=(\"beta_vs_10Y\", lambda x: float(np.nanmax(np.abs(x)))),\n",
        "        max_R2_10Y=(\"R2_vs_10Y\", \"max\"),\n",
        "    )\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    v5_sub_summary = pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_sub_summary.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_subperiod_summary.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V5 subperiod summary, sorted by positive subperiod count:\")\n",
        "if len(v5_sub_summary) > 0:\n",
        "    display(v5_sub_summary.sort_values([\"n_positive_ret\", \"min_subperiod_sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(60).round(4))\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"No subperiod table produced. Check evaluation sample length.\")\n"
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 33. V5 risk-budget scaling of pure-RV candidates =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def zero_cost_bps_frame(index, tenors=TENORS):\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(0.0, index=index, columns=tenors)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def vol_target_scale_from_strategy(W0, target_ann_vol=0.02, lookback=36, min_obs=12, max_leverage=10.0):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Build no-lookahead scalar leverage based on trailing gross strategy volatility.\"\"\"\n",
        "    zc = zero_cost_bps_frame(W0.index, tenors=W0.columns)\n",
        "    _, r_gross, _, _ = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(W0, ret_excess, zc)\n",
        "    ann_vol = r_gross.rolling(lookback, min_periods=min_obs).std() * np.sqrt(12)\n",
        "    scale = (target_ann_vol / ann_vol).shift(1)\n",
        "    scale = scale.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan).fillna(0.0).clip(lower=0.0, upper=max_leverage)\n",
        "    return scale\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def scale_weights_by_series(W0, scale):\n",
        "    scale = scale.reindex(W0.index).fillna(0.0)\n",
        "    return W0.mul(scale, axis=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "V5_TARGET_VOLS = [0.005, 0.01, 0.02, 0.05]  # 50bp, 1%, 2%, 5% annual active-vol targets.\n",
        "V5_MAX_LEVERAGE = 10.0\n",
        "V5_SCALED_WEIGHTS = {}\n",
        "V5_SCALES = {}\n",
        "for base_name, W0 in V5_RV_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "    for tv in V5_TARGET_VOLS:\n",
        "        sc = vol_target_scale_from_strategy(W0, target_ann_vol=tv, lookback=36, min_obs=12, max_leverage=V5_MAX_LEVERAGE)\n",
        "        nm = f\"{base_name}_voltarget_{int(tv*10000):04d}bp\"\n",
        "        V5_SCALED_WEIGHTS[nm] = scale_weights_by_series(W0, sc)\n",
        "        V5_SCALES[nm] = sc\n",
        "\n",
        "# Evaluate scaled portfolios under CS, AR and Fixed5. Fixed10/25 are often too punitive for low-vol RV, but remain in unscaled checks.\n",
        "V5_SCALED_COST_MODELS = {\n",
        "    \"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"Fixed5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=5.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0),\n",
        "}\n",
        "v5_scaled_perf, v5_scaled_returns, _, v5_scaled_costs, v5_scaled_turnovers = eval_named_weights_multi_cost(\n",
        "    V5_SCALED_WEIGHTS, V5_SCALED_COST_MODELS, ret_excess, eval_start\n",
        ")\n",
        "v5_scaled_expo = exposure_for_weight_return_pairs(V5_SCALED_WEIGHTS, v5_scaled_returns, V5_SCALED_COST_MODELS, eval_start)\n",
        "v5_scaled_all = v5_scaled_perf.join(v5_scaled_expo.drop(columns=[\"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\"], errors=\"ignore\"), how=\"left\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Add realized average leverage / gross and target vol labels.\n",
        "lev_rows = []\n",
        "for nm, sc in V5_SCALES.items():\n",
        "    lev_rows.append({\n",
        "        \"base_scaled_strategy\": nm,\n",
        "        \"avg_scale\": sc.loc[eval_start:].replace(0, np.nan).mean(),\n",
        "        \"max_scale\": sc.loc[eval_start:].max(),\n",
        "        \"p95_scale\": sc.loc[eval_start:].quantile(0.95),\n",
        "    })\n",
        "lev_df = pd.DataFrame(lev_rows).set_index(\"base_scaled_strategy\") if lev_rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_scaled_all[\"base_scaled_strategy\"] = v5_scaled_all[\"base_strategy\"]\n",
        "v5_scaled_all = v5_scaled_all.join(lev_df, on=\"base_scaled_strategy\")\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_scaled_all.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_risk_scaled_performance_exposure.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 risk-scaled pure RV candidates, sorted by Sharpe:\")\n",
        "show_cols_scaled = [\n",
        "    \"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\", \"ann_ret\", \"ann_vol\", \"Sharpe\", \"MaxDD\", \"ann_turnover\", \"NW_t_mean\",\n",
        "    \"avg_gross_$\", \"avg_duration_exposure\", \"beta_vs_10Y\", \"R2_vs_10Y\", \"avg_scale\", \"p95_scale\", \"max_scale\"\n",
        "]\n",
        "display(v5_scaled_all[show_cols_scaled].sort_values([\"cost_model\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=[True, False]).head(80).round(4))\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",

\"number\",\n        \"std\": 7.721953860816018e-05,\n        \"min\": 0.00026,\n        \"max\": 0.00052,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 6,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.00035,\n \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 3.7796447300922733e-06,\n        \"min\": -0.0,\n        \"max\": 1e-05,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          1e-05,\n          0.0\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"funding_ann\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n 0.00023136088075311514,\n        \"min\": -0.00088,\n        \"max\": -2e-05,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 9,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.00068,\n          -4e-05\n        ],\n 0.0002209086574144049,\n        \"min\": -2e-05,\n        \"max\": 0.001,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 20,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.00066,\n          0.00023\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"

      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 34. V5 leg, weight and attribution diagnostics =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def weight_leg_diagnostics(weights_dict):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "    for name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        Wlag = lag_weights(W0).loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "        if len(Wlag) == 0:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        avg_w = Wlag.mean(axis=0)\n",
        "        avg_abs_w = Wlag.abs().mean(axis=0)\n",
        "        freq_nonzero = (Wlag.abs() > 1e-8).mean(axis=0)\n",
        "        row = {\n",
        "            \"strategy\": name,\n",
        "            \"avg_net\": Wlag.sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_gross\": Wlag.abs().sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_duration_exposure\": (Wlag * Dvec).sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_abs_duration_exposure\": (Wlag * Dvec).sum(axis=1).abs().mean(),\n",
        "            \"ann_turnover\": W0.diff().abs().sum(axis=1).loc[eval_start:].mean() * 12,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "        for n in TENORS:\n",
        "            row[f\"avg_w_{n}Y\"] = avg_w[n]\n",
        "            row[f\"avg_abs_w_{n}Y\"] = avg_abs_w[n]\n",
        "            row[f\"freq_nonzero_{n}Y\"] = freq_nonzero[n]\n",
        "        rows.append(row)\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"strategy\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_leg_diag = weight_leg_diagnostics(V5_RV_WEIGHTS)\n",
        "v5_leg_diag.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_candidate_weight_leg_diagnostics.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 weight/leg diagnostics for shortlisted pure-RV candidates:\")\n",
        "display(v5_leg_diag.sort_values(\"ann_turnover\").round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Attribution under CS and AR for top cost-robust candidates.\n",
        "if len(v5_cost_summary) > 0:\n",
        "    top_for_attr = v5_cost_summary.sort_values([\"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=False).head(12).index.tolist()\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    top_for_attr = list(V5_RV_WEIGHTS.keys())[:12]\n",
        "\n",
        "attr_rows = []\n",
        "for cost_name, cost_df in {\"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4, \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4, \"Fixed5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=5.0)}.items():\n",
        "    for name in top_for_attr:\n",
        "        W0 = V5_RV_WEIGHTS[name]\n",
        "        A = attribution_with_cost_model(W0, cost_df).loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "        row = {\"strategy\": name, \"cost_model\": cost_name}\n",
        "        for col in [\"carry\", \"roll\", \"repricing\", \"convexity\", \"funding\", \"cost\", \"total\"]:\n",
        "            row[col + \"_ann\"] = A[col].mean() * 12\n",
        "        attr_rows.append(row)\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_attr = pd.DataFrame(attr_rows).set_index([\"strategy\", \"cost_model\"]) if attr_rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "v5_attr.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_top_candidate_attribution_cs_ar_fixed5.csv\")\n",
        "print(\"V5 top candidate attribution, CS / AR / Fixed5:\")\n",
        "display(v5_attr.round(5))\n"
      ]
    },

            "application/vnd.google.colaboratory.intrinsic+json": {
              "type": "dataframe",
              "summary": "{\n  \"name\": \"print(\\\"4) If risk-scaled versions need excessive leverage, report the sleeve as low-risk/low-return rather than scalable alpha\",\n  \"rows\": 20,\n  \"fields\": [\n    {\n      \"column\": \"base_strategy\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 20,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarterly_smooth\",\n          \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_top2_net_dv01_raw\",\n          \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_pc12_raw\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"rv_candidate_level\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"strong_dynamic_cost_candidate\",\n          \"reject\",\n          \"spin_off_candidate\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"comment\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Passes CS and AR dynamic cost gates; needs fixed-cost and subperiod robustness.\",\n          \"Fails multi-cost pure-RV requirements.\",\n          \"Passes CS, AR and Fixed5 gates; check subperiods, scaling and leg diagnostics before separate repo.\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"n_cost_passes\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0,\n        \"min\": 1,\n        \"max\": 4,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 4,\n        \"samples\": [\n          2,\n          4,\n          3\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"min_ann_ret\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.0015017445994926245,\n        \"min\": -0.0061,\n        \"max\": -0.0012,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 9,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.0061,\n          -0.0012,\n          -0.0023\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"min_sharpe\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.25324926580659407,\n        \"min\": -1.686,\n        \"max\": -0.8457,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 17,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -1.2028,\n          -0.8457,\n          -1.1139\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"min_NW_t\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.5793117648963885,\n        \"min\": -5.733,\n        \"max\": -3.6905,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 17,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -4.5937,\n          -3.8434,\n          -4.3508\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"max_abs_beta_10Y\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.0005565637051539894,\n        \"min\": 0.0002,\n        \"max\": 0.0023,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 12,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.0008,\n          0.0013,\n          0.0009\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"max_R2_10Y\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.005537850618577952,\n        \"min\": 0.0002,\n        \"max\": 0.0227,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 17,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.0027,\n          0.0066,\n          0.0095\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n         {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V5 reading rules:\n",
            "1) Spin-off is defensible only for strategies that pass CS + AR + at least Fixed5 under low-beta/duration-neutral filters.\n",
            "2) CS-only success is not enough: keep as candidate, not as separate repo headline.\n",
            "3) Fixed10/25 are conservative stress tests; failure there is not automatically fatal, but must be reported.\n",
            "4) If risk-scaled versions need excessive leverage, report the sleeve as low-risk/low-return rather than scalable alpha.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 35. V5 plots and spin-off verdict table =====\n",
        "# Compact charts for the best candidates under multiple cost assumptions.\n",
        "\n",
        "if len(v5_cost_summary) > 0:\n",
        "    ordered = v5_cost_summary.sort_values([\"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=False).index.tolist()\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    ordered = list(V5_RV_WEIGHTS.keys())\n",
        "plot_bases = ordered[:6]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Wealth curves under CS and AR, unscaled.\n",
        "for cost_name in [\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\"]:\n",
        "    plot_ret = {}\n",
        "    for base in plot_bases:\n",
        "        nm = f\"{base}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "        if nm in v5_returns:\n",
        "            plot_ret[base] = v5_returns[nm]\n",
        "    if plot_ret:\n",
        "        rp = pd.DataFrame(plot_ret).loc[eval_start:].dropna(how=\"all\")\n",
        "        wealth = (1 + rp.fillna(0)).cumprod()\n",
        "        ax = wealth.plot(figsize=(13, 5), title=f\"V5 pure-RV candidates — {cost_name}\")\n",
        "        ax.set_ylabel(\"growth of $1 active return\")\n",
        "        plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Cost-robust heatmap-style table: ann_ret and Sharpe by cost.\n",
        "if len(v5_all) > 0:\n",
        "    top_table_bases = plot_bases[:10]\n",
        "    piv_ret = v5_all[v5_all[\"base_strategy\"].isin(top_table_bases)].pivot_table(index=\"base_strategy\", columns=\"cost_model\", values=\"ann_ret\")\n",
        "    piv_sh = v5_all[v5_all[\"base_strategy\"].isin(top_table_bases)].pivot_table(index=\"base_strategy\", columns=\"cost_model\", values=\"Sharpe\")\n",
        "    print(\"Annualized net return by cost model:\")\n",
        "    display(piv_ret.round(5))\n",
        "    print(\"Sharpe by cost model:\")\n",
        "    display(piv_sh.round(3))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Final V5 spin-off verdict table.\n",
        "def final_spin_off_verdict(cost_summary, sub_summary=None):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    if cost_summary is None or len(cost_summary) == 0:\n",
        "        return pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "    for base, row in cost_summary.iterrows():\n",
        "        level = row[\"rv_candidate_level\"]\n",
        "        verdict = \"do_not_spin_off\"\n",
        "        comment = \"Fails multi-cost pure-RV requirements.\"\n",
        "        if level == \"strong_dynamic_cost_candidate\":\n",
        "            verdict = \"candidate_only\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS and AR dynamic cost gates; needs fixed-cost and subperiod robustness.\"\n",
        "        elif level == \"spin_off_candidate\":\n",
        "            verdict = \"spin_off_possible_after_review\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS, AR and Fixed5 gates; check subperiods, scaling and leg diagnostics before separate repo.\"\n",
        "        elif level == \"robust_spin_off_candidate\":\n",
        "            verdict = \"spin_off_defensible\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS, AR, Fixed5 and Fixed10 gates under strict low-beta/duration-neutral filters.\"\n",
        "        rows.append({\n",
        "            \"base_strategy\": base,\n",
        "            \"rv_candidate_level\": level,\n",
        "            \"recommended_action\": verdict,\n",
        "            \"comment\": comment,\n",
        "            \"n_cost_passes\": row.get(\"n_cost_passes\", np.nan),\n",
        "            \"min_ann_ret\": row.get(\"min_ann_ret\", np.nan),\n",
        "            \"min_sharpe\": row.get(\"min_sharpe\", np.nan),\n",
        "            \"min_NW_t\": row.get(\"min_NW_t\", np.nan),\n",
        "            \"max_abs_beta_10Y\": row.get(\"max_abs_beta_10Y\", np.nan),\n",
        "            \"max_R2_10Y\": row.get(\"max_R2_10Y\", np.nan),\n",
        "        })\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"base_strategy\")\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_verdict = final_spin_off_verdict(v5_cost_summary, v5_sub_summary if \"v5_sub_summary\" in globals() else None)\n",
        "v5_verdict.to_csv(V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_final_spin_off_verdict.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 final spin-off verdict table:\")\n",
        "display(v5_verdict.sort_values([\"recommended_action\", \"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=[True, False, False]).head(40).round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 reading rules:\")\n",
        "print(\"1) Spin-off is defensible only for strategies that pass CS + AR + at least Fixed5 under low-beta/duration-neutral filters.\")\n",
        "print(\"2) CS-only success is not enough: keep as candidate, not as separate repo headline.\")\n",
        "print(\"3) Fixed10/25 are conservative stress tests; failure there is not automatically fatal, but must be reported.\")\n",
        "print(\"4) If risk-scaled versions need excessive leverage, report the sleeve as low-risk/low-return rather than scalable alpha.\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 37,
      "id": "40f5a3ff",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "40f5a3ff",
        "outputId": "8be430f9-1b52-4d69-863a-6ce8c17a49d4"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V5 artifacts exported to: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v5_pure_rv_robustness\n",
            "V5 Excel bundle: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v5_pure_rv_robustness/v5_pure_rv_robustness_bundle.xlsx\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 36. V5 export bundle =====\n",
        "# Save top candidate weights and key tables in one Excel workbook for inspection.\n",
        "\n",
        "v5_bundle_path = V5_OUT_DIR / \"v5_pure_rv_robustness_bundle.xlsx\"\n",
        "with pd.ExcelWriter(v5_bundle_path) as writer:\n",
        "    if len(v5_all) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_all[show_cols].sort_values([\"passes_v5_cost_specific_gate\", \"v5_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"], ascending=False).to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"all_cost_perf\")\n",
        "    if len(v5_cost_summary) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_cost_summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"cost_summary\")\n",
        "    if \"v5_sub_summary\" in globals() and len(v5_sub_summary) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_sub_summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"subperiod_summary\")\n",
        "    if len(v5_leg_diag) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_leg_diag.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"leg_diag\")\n",
        "    if len(v5_attr) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_attr.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"attribution\")\n",
        "    if len(v5_verdict) > 0:\n",
        "        v5_verdict.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"verdict\")\n",
        "    # Individual weights for top strategies only.\n",
        "    for base in plot_bases[:8]:\n",
        "        if base in V5_RV_WEIGHTS:\n",
        "            safe = base[:31].replace(\"/\", \"_\")\n",
        "            V5_RV_WEIGHTS[base].to_excel(writer, sheet_name=safe)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V5 artifacts exported to:\", V5_OUT_DIR)\n",
        "print(\"V5 Excel bundle:\", v5_bundle_path)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "id": "c04c70b9",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "c04c70b9"
      },
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "## V6: pure-RV proof-of-fire layer\n",
        "\n",
        "This section freezes the V5 pure-RV candidates and deliberately stops searching.  \n",
        "The purpose is not to add more variants, but to stress-test whether the duration-neutral RV signal is robust enough for a separate `macroanchor-curve-relative-value` repo.\n",
        "\n",
        "The V6 tests focus on:\n",
        "\n",
        "1. multi-cost gates including CS, AR, fixed costs and stressed dynamic costs;\n",
        "2. fixed-cost breakeven thresholds;\n",
        "3. orthogonality to yield-curve PCs, not only to 10Y returns;\n",
        "4. circular-shift placebo tests that break the alignment between weights and subsequent returns;\n",
        "5. moving-block bootstrap confidence intervals;\n",
        "6. stress-window and subperiod behavior;\n",
        "7. leg concentration, holding and turnover diagnostics;\n",
        "8. a final spin-off decision table.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 38,
      "id": "56c5b35a",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "56c5b35a",
        "outputId": "aef369ef-b353-456d-e09f-eb5d1cda33ac"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V6 output directory: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire\n",
            "Frozen V6 candidates:\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "- V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarterly_smooth\n",
            "V6 cost models: ['CS_lagged', 'AR_lagged', 'AR_2x_lagged', 'AR_3x_lagged', 'Stress_AR_3x_events', 'Fixed2p5bp', 'Fixed5bp', 'Fixed7p5bp', 'Fixed10bp', 'Fixed15bp', 'Fixed25bp']\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 37. V6 settings: frozen candidates and proof-of-fire cost grid =====\n",
        "\n",
        "V6_OUT_DIR = OUT_DIR / \"v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire\"\n",
        "V6_OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# IMPORTANT: V6 freezes the candidate set. No new score families are introduced here.\n",
        "# It only stress-tests the best V5 candidates and the interpretable butterfly challenger.\n",
        "DEFAULT_V6_CANDIDATES = [\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_net_dv01_quarterly_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_quarterly_smooth\",\n",
        "    \"V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarterly_smooth\",\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# If V5 already identified spin-off candidates, use them first, but still include the butterfly challenger.\n",
        "V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES = []\n",
        "if \"v5_cost_summary\" in globals() and len(v5_cost_summary) > 0:\n",
        "    _eligible = v5_cost_summary[\n",
        "        v5_cost_summary[\"rv_candidate_level\"].isin([\"spin_off_candidate\", \"robust_spin_off_candidate\", \"strong_dynamic_cost_candidate\"])\n",
        "    ].sort_values([\"n_cost_passes\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=False).index.tolist()\n",
        "    V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES.extend(_eligible)\n",
        "\n",
        "for nm in DEFAULT_V6_CANDIDATES:\n",
        "    if nm not in V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES:\n",
        "        V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES.append(nm)\n",
        "\n",
        "V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES = [nm for nm in V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES if \"V4_RV_WEIGHTS\" in globals() and nm in V4_RV_WEIGHTS]\n",
        "V6_RV_WEIGHTS = {nm: V4_RV_WEIGHTS[nm].copy() for nm in V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES}\n",
        "\n",
        "# Helpers for stressed cost models.\n",
        "def _align_cost_df(cost_df, index, columns, fill_bps=5.0):\n",
        "    out = cost_df.reindex(index=index, columns=columns).astype(float)\n",
        "    out = out.ffill().bfill()\n",
        "    return out.fillna(fill_bps)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def floor_cost_model(cost_df, floor_bps=0.25):\n",
        "    out = cost_df.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "    return out.clip(lower=floor_bps)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def scale_cost_model(cost_df, multiplier=1.0, floor_bps=0.25):\n",
        "    out = cost_df.copy().astype(float) * multiplier\n",
        "    return out.clip(lower=floor_bps)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def stress_cost_windows(cost_df, multiplier=3.0, floor_bps=0.25, windows=None):\n",
        "    out = cost_df.copy().astype(float).clip(lower=floor_bps)\n",
        "    if windows is None:\n",
        "        windows = [\n",
        "            (\"GFC\", pd.Timestamp(\"2007-07-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2009-06-30\")),\n",
        "            (\"Covid\", pd.Timestamp(\"2020-02-29\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2020-06-30\")),\n",
        "            (\"Inflation_2022\", pd.Timestamp(\"2022-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2022-12-31\")),\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "    for _, s, e in windows:\n",
        "        mask = (out.index >= s) & (out.index <= e)\n",
        "        out.loc[mask, :] = out.loc[mask, :] * multiplier\n",
        "    return out.clip(lower=floor_bps)\n",
        "\n",
        "# V6 cost grid. Dynamic costs are already lagged in V4/V5; fixed costs are one-way bps.\n",
        "V6_COST_MODELS = {\n",
        "    \"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_2x_lagged\": scale_cost_model(ar_cost_bps_v4, 2.0),\n",
        "    \"AR_3x_lagged\": scale_cost_model(ar_cost_bps_v4, 3.0),\n",
        "    \"Stress_AR_3x_events\": stress_cost_windows(ar_cost_bps_v4, 3.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed2p5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=2.5),\n",
        "    \"Fixed5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=5.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed7p5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=7.5),\n",
        "    \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed15bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=15.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed25bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=25.0),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 output directory:\", V6_OUT_DIR)\n",
        "print(\"Frozen V6 candidates:\")\n",
        "for nm in V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES:\n",
        "    print(\"-\", nm)\n",
        "print(\"V6 cost models:\", list(V6_COST_MODELS.keys()))\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 39,
      "id": "edbbcbe4",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "edbbcbe4",
        "outputId": "f051e6f5-6b11-4dee-a860-d53893d7fb22"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V6 helper functions ready.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 38. V6 helpers: strict gates, PC exposure and fixed-cost breakeven =====\n",
        "\n",
        "def v6_cost_specific_gate(row):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Proof-of-fire RV gate. Stricter than V5 on orthogonality and implementation.\"\"\"\n",
        "    checks = {\n",
        "        \"positive_net\": row.get(\"ann_ret\", np.nan) > 0,\n",
        "        \"sharpe\": row.get(\"Sharpe\", np.nan) > 0.25,\n",
        "        \"nw_t\": row.get(\"NW_t_mean\", np.nan) > 1.60,\n",
        "        \"low_beta_10Y\": abs(row.get(\"beta_vs_10Y\", np.nan)) < 0.075,\n",
        "        \"low_R2_10Y\": row.get(\"R2_vs_10Y\", np.nan) < 0.075,\n",
        "        \"duration_neutral\": abs(row.get(\"avg_duration_exposure\", np.nan)) < 0.10,\n",
        "        \"turnover\": row.get(\"ann_turnover\", np.inf) < 2.00,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    return checks, all(checks.values()), sum(checks.values())\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def strategy_returns_fixed_bps(weights, ret_excess_df, bps):\n",
        "    return strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(weights, ret_excess_df, fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=bps))\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def eval_v6_multi_cost(weights_dict, cost_models):\n",
        "    perf, rets, gross, costs, turns = eval_named_weights_multi_cost(\n",
        "        weights_dict, cost_models, ret_excess, eval_start\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    expo = exposure_for_weight_return_pairs(weights_dict, rets, cost_models, eval_start)\n",
        "    out = perf.join(expo.drop(columns=[\"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\"], errors=\"ignore\"), how=\"left\")\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    for idx, row in out.iterrows():\n",
        "        checks, passed, score = v6_cost_specific_gate(row)\n",
        "        add = {\"name\": idx, \"v6_gate_score\": score, \"passes_v6_cost_gate\": passed}\n",
        "        add.update({f\"pass_{k}\": v for k, v in checks.items()})\n",
        "        rows.append(add)\n",
        "    gate_df = pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "    out = out.join(gate_df, how=\"left\")\n",
        "    return out, rets, gross, costs, turns\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def yield_pc_exposure_table(returns_dict, weights_dict, cost_models, n_pcs=3):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Regress strategy returns on yield-change PCs to check if RV is just level/slope/curvature exposure.\"\"\"\n",
        "    dy = curve[TENORS].diff().loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "    Xraw = dy - dy.mean()\n",
        "    # SVD PCA on yield changes; no sklearn dependency.\n",
        "    U, S, Vt = np.linalg.svd(Xraw.values, full_matrices=False)\n",
        "    pcs = pd.DataFrame(U[:, :n_pcs] * S[:n_pcs], index=Xraw.index, columns=[f\"PC{i+1}\" for i in range(n_pcs)])\n",
        "\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    for cost_name in cost_models.keys():\n",
        "        for base_name, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "            nm = f\"{base_name}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "            if nm not in returns_dict:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            y = returns_dict[nm].loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "            df = pd.concat([y.rename(\"r\"), pcs], axis=1).dropna()\n",
        "            if len(df) < n_pcs + 10:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "            Y = df[\"r\"].values\n",
        "            X = np.column_stack([np.ones(len(df)), df[[f\"PC{i+1}\" for i in range(n_pcs)]].values])\n",
        "            beta = np.linalg.lstsq(X, Y, rcond=None)[0]\n",
        "            yhat = X @ beta\n",
        "            ssr = float(np.sum((Y-yhat)**2))\n",
        "            sst = float(np.sum((Y-Y.mean())**2))\n",
        "            r2 = 1 - ssr/sst if sst > 0 else np.nan\n",
        "            row = {\"name\": nm, \"base_strategy\": base_name, \"cost_model\": cost_name, \"R2_yield_PC123\": r2}\n",
        "            for i in range(n_pcs):\n",
        "                row[f\"beta_PC{i+1}\"] = beta[i+1]\n",
        "            rows.append(row)\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"name\") if rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def fixed_cost_breakeven_table(weights_dict, bps_grid=None):\n",
        "    if bps_grid is None:\n",
        "        bps_grid = np.arange(0, 30.01, 0.5)\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    full_grid_rows = []\n",
        "    for base, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        for bps in bps_grid:\n",
        "            r, rg, c, to = strategy_returns_fixed_bps(W0, ret_excess, float(bps))\n",
        "            st = perf_stats(r.loc[eval_start:], turnover=to.loc[eval_start:], name=f\"{base}_Fixed{bps:g}bp\")\n",
        "            ann_mean, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(r.loc[eval_start:], lag=12)\n",
        "            st.update({\"base_strategy\": base, \"fixed_bps\": float(bps), \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t})\n",
        "            # Exposure checks under fixed costs are effectively cost-independent except for return series intercept.\n",
        "            static10 = ret_excess[10].loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "            a10, b10, r2_10 = ols_beta_alpha(r.loc[eval_start:], static10)\n",
        "            Dvec = pd.Series(TENORS, index=TENORS, dtype=float)\n",
        "            Wlag = lag_weights(W0).loc[eval_start:]\n",
        "            st.update({\n",
        "                \"beta_vs_10Y\": b10,\n",
        "                \"R2_vs_10Y\": r2_10,\n",
        "                \"avg_duration_exposure\": (Wlag * Dvec).sum(axis=1).mean(),\n",
        "            })\n",
        "            checks, passed, score = v6_cost_specific_gate(st)\n",
        "            st[\"passes_v6_gate\"] = passed\n",
        "            st[\"v6_gate_score\"] = score\n",
        "            full_grid_rows.append(st)\n",
        "        grid_df = pd.DataFrame([x for x in full_grid_rows if x[\"base_strategy\"] == base])\n",
        "        pass_df = grid_df[grid_df[\"passes_v6_gate\"]]\n",
        "        pos_df = grid_df[grid_df[\"ann_ret\"] > 0]\n",
        "        rows.append({\n",
        "            \"base_strategy\": base,\n",
        "            \"max_fixed_bps_passing_v6_gate\": pass_df[\"fixed_bps\"].max() if len(pass_df) else np.nan,\n",
        "            \"max_fixed_bps_positive_net\": pos_df[\"fixed_bps\"].max() if len(pos_df) else np.nan,\n",
        "            \"fixed5_pass\": bool(grid_df.loc[np.isclose(grid_df[\"fixed_bps\"], 5.0), \"passes_v6_gate\"].iloc[0]) if np.any(np.isclose(grid_df[\"fixed_bps\"], 5.0)) else False,\n",
        "            \"fixed10_pass\": bool(grid_df.loc[np.isclose(grid_df[\"fixed_bps\"], 10.0), \"passes_v6_gate\"].iloc[0]) if np.any(np.isclose(grid_df[\"fixed_bps\"], 10.0)) else False,\n",
        "        })\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"base_strategy\"), pd.DataFrame(full_grid_rows)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 helper functions ready.\")\n"
      ]
    },
    {

              "V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_proj_dv01_quarte... -0.0024        0.7431   \n",
              "V4_tp_resid_quadratic_maturity_butterfly_quarte... -0.0079        1.3614   \n",

            "application/vnd.google.colaboratory.intrinsic+json": {
              "type": "dataframe",
              "summary": "{\n  \"name\": \"display(v6_all\",\n  \"rows\": 11,\n  \"fields\": [\n    {\n      \"column\": \"cost_model\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 11,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Fixed15bp\",\n          \"AR_2x_lagged\",\n          \"Fixed7p5bp\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"passes_v6_cost_gate\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 1,\n        \"min\": 0,\n        \"max\": 3,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0,\n          3,\n          2\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 1,\n        \"min\": 0,\n        \"max\": 3,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0,\n          3,\n          2\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 39. V6 multi-cost proof-of-fire evaluation =====\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_all, v6_returns, v6_gross_returns, v6_costs, v6_turnovers = eval_v6_multi_cost(V6_RV_WEIGHTS, V6_COST_MODELS)\n",
        "v6_pc_expo = yield_pc_exposure_table(v6_returns, V6_RV_WEIGHTS, V6_COST_MODELS, n_pcs=3)\n",
        "v6_all = v6_all.join(v6_pc_expo[[\"R2_yield_PC123\", \"beta_PC1\", \"beta_PC2\", \"beta_PC3\"]], how=\"left\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Add an even stricter PC orthogonality flag. A pure RV sleeve should not just be a PC1/PC2/PC3 factor bet.\n",
        "v6_all[\"pass_low_R2_PC123\"] = v6_all[\"R2_yield_PC123\"].fillna(1.0) < 0.10\n",
        "v6_all[\"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\"] = v6_all[\"passes_v6_cost_gate\"].astype(bool) & v6_all[\"pass_low_R2_PC123\"].astype(bool)\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_all.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_all_cost_pc_exposure_proof_fire.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "show_v6_cols = [\n",
        "    \"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\", \"ann_ret\", \"ann_vol\", \"Sharpe\", \"MaxDD\", \"ann_turnover\", \"NW_t_mean\",\n",
        "    \"avg_duration_exposure\", \"beta_vs_10Y\", \"R2_vs_10Y\", \"R2_yield_PC123\",\n",
        "    \"avg_cost_bps_ann\", \"v6_gate_score\", \"passes_v6_cost_gate\", \"pass_low_R2_PC123\", \"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\"\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 proof-of-fire table, sorted by proof-fire pass, cost gate score and Sharpe:\")\n",
        "display(v6_all[show_v6_cols].sort_values(\n",
        "    [\"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\", \"passes_v6_cost_gate\", \"v6_gate_score\", \"Sharpe\"],\n",
        "    ascending=False\n",
        ").round(5))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Pass counts by cost model:\")\n",
        "display(v6_all.groupby(\"cost_model\")[[\"passes_v6_cost_gate\", \"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\"]].sum().astype(int))\n"
      ]
    },

      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 40. V6 fixed-cost breakeven and cost-fragility curves =====\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_breakeven, v6_fixed_grid = fixed_cost_breakeven_table(V6_RV_WEIGHTS, bps_grid=np.arange(0, 30.01, 0.5))\n",
        "v6_breakeven.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_fixed_cost_breakeven_summary.csv\")\n",
        "v6_fixed_grid.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_fixed_cost_full_grid.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 fixed-cost breakeven summary:\")\n",
        "display(v6_breakeven.round(3))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot fixed-cost fragility: ann_ret and Sharpe as one-way fixed bps increase.\n",
        "for base in V6_CANDIDATE_NAMES:\n",
        "    g = v6_fixed_grid[v6_fixed_grid[\"base_strategy\"] == base].copy()\n",
        "    if len(g) == 0:\n",
        "        continue\n",
        "    ax = g.plot(x=\"fixed_bps\", y=[\"ann_ret\", \"Sharpe\"], figsize=(11, 4), title=f\"V6 fixed-cost fragility: {base}\")\n",
        "    ax.axvline(5, linestyle=\"--\", linewidth=1)\n",
        "    ax.axvline(10, linestyle=\"--\", linewidth=1)\n",
        "    ax.set_xlabel(\"one-way fixed transaction cost, bps\")\n",
        "    plt.show()\n"
      ]
    },

    \"min\": -0.00074,\n        \"max\": 0.00054,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 9,\n        \"samples\": [\n          -0.00074\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"boot_ann_p50\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.0003632961476661855,\n        \"min\": -0.00035,\n        \"max\": 0.001,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 10,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.00031\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"boot_ann_p95\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.0004023303331464047,\n        \"min\": 0.0001,\n        \"max\": 0.00155,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 9,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.0001\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"boot_sh_p05\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.3312317890557315,\n        \"min\": -0.53411,\n        \"max\": 0.45866,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 12,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.05618\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"boot_sh_p50\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.3001330862212578,\n        \"min\": -0.23748,\n        \"max\": 0.71426,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 12,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.31088\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"boot_sh_p95\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0.2746011448860461,\n        \"min\": 0.06031,\n        \"max\": 0.96749,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 12,\n        \"samples\": [\n          0.53114\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"

        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 41. V6 placebo and moving-block bootstrap tests =====\n",
        "\n",
        "V6_RANDOM_SEED = 20260705\n",
        "V6_PLACEBO_B = 500          # increase to 1000/5000 for final repo run\n",
        "V6_BOOTSTRAP_B = 1000       # increase to 5000 for final repo run\n",
        "V6_BLOCK_LEN = 12\n",
        "rng = np.random.default_rng(V6_RANDOM_SEED)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def circular_shift_weights(W0, shift):\n",
        "    W = W0.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "    vals = np.roll(W.values, int(shift), axis=0)\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(vals, index=W.index, columns=W.columns)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def placebo_shift_test(W0, cost_df, observed_return, B=500, min_abs_shift=12):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Break timing alignment by circularly shifting the weight history relative to future returns.\"\"\"\n",
        "    obs = observed_return.loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "    obs_ann = obs.mean() * 12\n",
        "    obs_sh = obs.mean() / obs.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12) if obs.std(ddof=1) > 0 else np.nan\n",
        "    n = len(W0)\n",
        "    valid_shifts = np.array([s for s in range(min_abs_shift, n-min_abs_shift)])\n",
        "    if len(valid_shifts) == 0:\n",
        "        valid_shifts = np.arange(1, max(2, n-1))\n",
        "    ann, sh = [], []\n",
        "    for _ in range(B):\n",
        "        k = int(rng.choice(valid_shifts))\n",
        "        Ws = circular_shift_weights(W0, k)\n",
        "        r_s, _, _, _ = strategy_returns_dynamic_cost(Ws, ret_excess, cost_df)\n",
        "        rr = r_s.loc[eval_start:].dropna()\n",
        "        ann.append(rr.mean() * 12)\n",
        "        sh.append(rr.mean() / rr.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12) if rr.std(ddof=1) > 0 else np.nan)\n",
        "    ann = np.asarray(ann, dtype=float)\n",
        "    sh = np.asarray(sh, dtype=float)\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"obs_ann_ret\": obs_ann,\n",
        "        \"obs_sharpe\": obs_sh,\n",
        "        \"placebo_ann_mean\": np.nanmean(ann),\n",
        "        \"placebo_ann_p95\": np.nanquantile(ann, 0.95),\n",
        "        \"placebo_sharpe_mean\": np.nanmean(sh),\n",
        "        \"placebo_sharpe_p95\": np.nanquantile(sh, 0.95),\n",
        "        \"p_value_ann_ge_obs\": float(np.nanmean(ann >= obs_ann)),\n",
        "        \"p_value_sharpe_ge_obs\": float(np.nanmean(sh >= obs_sh)),\n",
        "        \"B\": B,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def moving_block_bootstrap(r, B=1000, block_len=12):\n",
        "    rr = r.loc[eval_start:].dropna().values.astype(float)\n",
        "    n = len(rr)\n",
        "    if n < block_len * 2:\n",
        "        return {\"boot_ann_p05\": np.nan, \"boot_ann_p50\": np.nan, \"boot_ann_p95\": np.nan,\n",
        "                \"boot_sh_p05\": np.nan, \"boot_sh_p50\": np.nan, \"boot_sh_p95\": np.nan, \"B\": 0}\n",
        "    starts = np.arange(0, n - block_len + 1)\n",
        "    ann, sh = [], []\n",
        "    for _ in range(B):\n",
        "        sample = []\n",
        "        while len(sample) < n:\n",
        "            s = int(rng.choice(starts))\n",
        "            sample.extend(rr[s:s+block_len].tolist())\n",
        "        sample = np.asarray(sample[:n])\n",
        "        ann.append(sample.mean() * 12)\n",
        "        sh.append(sample.mean() / sample.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12) if sample.std(ddof=1) > 0 else np.nan)\n",
        "    ann = np.asarray(ann, dtype=float)\n",
        "    sh = np.asarray(sh, dtype=float)\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"boot_ann_p05\": np.nanquantile(ann, 0.05),\n",
        "        \"boot_ann_p50\": np.nanquantile(ann, 0.50),\n",
        "        \"boot_ann_p95\": np.nanquantile(ann, 0.95),\n",
        "        \"boot_sh_p05\": np.nanquantile(sh, 0.05),\n",
        "        \"boot_sh_p50\": np.nanquantile(sh, 0.50),\n",
        "        \"boot_sh_p95\": np.nanquantile(sh, 0.95),\n",
        "        \"B\": B,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "# Run placebo/bootstrap on the most relevant cost models only.\n",
        "V6_INFERENCE_COST_MODELS = {\n",
        "    \"CS_lagged\": cs_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"AR_lagged\": ar_cost_bps_v4,\n",
        "    \"Fixed5bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=5.0),\n",
        "    \"Fixed10bp\": fixed_cost_bps_frame(dates, bps=10.0),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "inf_rows = []\n",
        "for base, W0 in V6_RV_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "    for cost_name, cost_df in V6_INFERENCE_COST_MODELS.items():\n",
        "        nm = f\"{base}_{cost_name}\"\n",
        "        if nm not in v6_returns:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "        r_obs = v6_returns[nm]\n",
        "        row = {\"base_strategy\": base, \"cost_model\": cost_name, \"name\": nm}\n",
        "        row.update(placebo_shift_test(W0, cost_df, r_obs, B=V6_PLACEBO_B, min_abs_shift=12))\n",
        "        row.update(moving_block_bootstrap(r_obs, B=V6_BOOTSTRAP_B, block_len=V6_BLOCK_LEN))\n",
        "        inf_rows.append(row)\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_inference = pd.DataFrame(inf_rows).set_index(\"name\") if inf_rows else pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "v6_inference.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_placebo_and_block_bootstrap.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 placebo / block bootstrap inference:\")\n",
        "show_inf = [\n",
        "    \"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\", \"obs_ann_ret\", \"obs_sharpe\", \"p_value_ann_ge_obs\", \"p_value_sharpe_ge_obs\",\n",
        "    \"placebo_ann_p95\", \"placebo_sharpe_p95\", \"boot_ann_p05\", \"boot_ann_p50\", \"boot_ann_p95\", \"boot_sh_p05\", \"boot_sh_p50\", \"boot_sh_p95\"\n",
        "]\n",
        "display(v6_inference[show_inf].sort_values([\"cost_model\", \"p_value_sharpe_ge_obs\", \"obs_sharpe\"], ascending=[True, True, False]).round(5))\n"
      ]
    },
    {

              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",

      "source": [
        "# ===== 42. V6 stress windows, recent regimes and leg stability =====\n",
        "\n",
        "V6_STRESS_WINDOWS = {\n",
        "    \"full\": (eval_start, dates.max()),\n",
        "    \"pre_GFC\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2000-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2007-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"GFC\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2007-07-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2009-06-30\")),\n",
        "    \"QE_ZLB\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2010-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2015-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"normalization\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2016-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2019-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"covid_shock\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2020-02-29\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2020-06-30\")),\n",
        "    \"inflation_2022\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2022-01-31\"), pd.Timestamp(\"2022-12-31\")),\n",
        "    \"recent_2023_2026\": (pd.Timestamp(\"2023-01-31\"), dates.max()),\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _v6_clip_period(s, e, idx):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Clip requested [s, e] period to the available index.\"\"\"\n",
        "    idx = pd.to_datetime(pd.Index(idx)).sort_values()\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(idx) == 0:\n",
        "        return None, None\n",
        "\n",
        "    s = pd.Timestamp(s)\n",
        "    e = pd.Timestamp(e)\n",
        "\n",
        "    avail = idx[(idx >= s) & (idx <= e)]\n",
        "    if len(avail) == 0:\n",
        "        return None, None\n",
        "\n",
        "    return avail.min(), avail.max()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _v6_basic_perf_stats(r):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Standalone monthly-return performance stats with stable key names.\"\"\"\n",
        "    rr = pd.Series(r).dropna().astype(float)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(rr) == 0:\n",
        "        return {\n",
        "            \"ann_ret\": np.nan,\n",
        "            \"ann_vol\": np.nan,\n",
        "            \"Sharpe\": np.nan,\n",
        "            \"MaxDD\": np.nan,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    ann_ret = rr.mean() * 12.0\n",
        "    ann_vol = rr.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12.0) if len(rr) > 1 else np.nan\n",
        "    sharpe = ann_ret / ann_vol if np.isfinite(ann_vol) and ann_vol > 0 else np.nan\n",
        "\n",
        "    wealth = (1.0 + rr).cumprod()\n",
        "    peak = wealth.cummax()\n",
        "    dd = wealth / peak - 1.0\n",
        "    maxdd = dd.min()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"ann_ret\": float(ann_ret),\n",
        "        \"ann_vol\": float(ann_vol),\n",
        "        \"Sharpe\": float(sharpe),\n",
        "        \"MaxDD\": float(maxdd),\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _v6_parse_base_cost_name(nm, cost_models):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Parse strategy name into base strategy and cost model using known suffixes.\"\"\"\n",
        "    for cm in sorted(cost_models.keys(), key=len, reverse=True):\n",
        "        suff = \"_\" + cm\n",
        "        if nm.endswith(suff):\n",
        "            return nm[:-len(suff)], cm\n",
        "    return nm, None\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def v6_period_perf(returns_dict, min_months=6):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    keep_costs = [\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\", \"Fixed10bp\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    for nm, r in returns_dict.items():\n",
        "        base, cost = _v6_parse_base_cost_name(nm, V6_COST_MODELS)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if cost not in keep_costs:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        r = pd.Series(r).copy()\n",
        "        r.index = pd.to_datetime(r.index)\n",
        "        r = r.sort_index()\n",
        "\n",
        "        r_eval = r.loc[pd.Timestamp(eval_start):].dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if len(r_eval) == 0:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        for label, (s, e) in V6_STRESS_WINDOWS.items():\n",
        "            s_clip, e_clip = _v6_clip_period(s, e, r_eval.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "            if s_clip is None:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "\n",
        "            rr = r_eval.loc[s_clip:e_clip].dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "            if len(rr) < min_months:\n",
        "                continue\n",
        "\n",
        "            st = _v6_basic_perf_stats(rr)\n",
        "            _, nw_t = nw_mean_tstat(rr, lag=min(12, max(1, len(rr) // 4)))\n",
        "\n",
        "            rows.append({\n",
        "                \"name\": nm,\n",
        "                \"base_strategy\": base,\n",
        "                \"cost_model\": cost,\n",
        "                \"period\": label,\n",
        "                \"start\": s_clip,\n",
        "                \"end\": e_clip,\n",
        "                \"n_months\": len(rr),\n",
        "                \"ann_ret\": st[\"ann_ret\"],\n",
        "                \"ann_vol\": st[\"ann_vol\"],\n",
        "                \"Sharpe\": st[\"Sharpe\"],\n",
        "                \"MaxDD\": st[\"MaxDD\"],\n",
        "                \"NW_t_mean\": nw_t,\n",
        "                \"positive_period\": st[\"ann_ret\"] > 0,\n",
        "            })\n",
        "\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_subperiod = v6_period_perf(v6_returns, min_months=6)\n",
        "v6_subperiod.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_stress_and_subperiod_performance.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "if len(v6_subperiod) > 0:\n",
        "    v6_sub_summary = (\n",
        "        v6_subperiod\n",
        "        .groupby([\"base_strategy\", \"cost_model\"])\n",
        "        .agg(\n",
        "            n_periods=(\"period\", \"count\"),\n",
        "            positive_periods=(\"positive_period\", \"sum\"),\n",
        "            min_ann_ret=(\"ann_ret\", \"min\"),\n",
        "            min_sharpe=(\"Sharpe\", \"min\"),\n",
        "            avg_ann_ret=(\"ann_ret\", \"mean\"),\n",
        "            avg_sharpe=(\"Sharpe\", \"mean\"),\n",
        "        )\n",
        "        .reset_index()\n",
        "        .sort_values([\"positive_periods\", \"min_sharpe\"], ascending=False)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    v6_sub_summary = pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_sub_summary.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_subperiod_summary.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 subperiod/stress summary:\")\n",
        "display(v6_sub_summary.round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _v6_tenor_value(col):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Robustly parse tenor column label into numeric maturity.\"\"\"\n",
        "    if isinstance(col, (int, float, np.integer, np.floating)):\n",
        "        return float(col)\n",
        "\n",
        "    s = str(col).upper().replace(\"Y\", \"\").strip()\n",
        "\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        return float(s)\n",
        "    except Exception:\n",
        "        return np.nan\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def _v6_tenor_label(col):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Clean tenor label for output columns.\"\"\"\n",
        "    val = _v6_tenor_value(col)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if np.isfinite(val):\n",
        "        if abs(val - int(val)) < 1e-10:\n",
        "            return f\"{int(val)}Y\"\n",
        "        return f\"{val:g}Y\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    return str(col)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def v6_leg_stability(weights_dict):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    for base, W0 in weights_dict.items():\n",
        "        W0 = W0.copy().astype(float)\n",
        "        W0.index = pd.to_datetime(W0.index)\n",
        "        W0 = W0.sort_index()\n",
        "\n",
        "        Wlag = lag_weights(W0).loc[pd.Timestamp(eval_start):].fillna(0.0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if len(Wlag) == 0:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        tenor_vals = pd.Series(\n",
        "            [_v6_tenor_value(c) for c in Wlag.columns],\n",
        "            index=Wlag.columns,\n",
        "            dtype=float\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        gross = Wlag.abs().sum(axis=1)\n",
        "        net = Wlag.sum(axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "        duration_exp = (Wlag * tenor_vals).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "        shares = Wlag.abs().div(gross.replace(0, np.nan), axis=0).fillna(0.0)\n",
        "        hhi = (shares ** 2).sum(axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "        active = Wlag.abs() > 1e-10\n",
        "        sign_change = (np.sign(Wlag).diff().abs() > 0)\n",
        "        sign_change_rate = sign_change.where(active | active.shift(1).fillna(False)).mean(axis=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "        row = {\n",
        "            \"base_strategy\": base,\n",
        "            \"avg_gross\": gross.mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_net\": net.mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_abs_duration\": duration_exp.abs().mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_duration\": duration_exp.mean(),\n",
        "            \"avg_hhi_abs_weights\": hhi.mean(),\n",
        "            \"p95_hhi_abs_weights\": hhi.quantile(0.95),\n",
        "            \"ann_turnover\": W0.diff().abs().sum(axis=1).loc[pd.Timestamp(eval_start):].mean() * 12.0,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "        for col in Wlag.columns:\n",
        "            lab = _v6_tenor_label(col)\n",
        "\n",
        "            row[f\"avg_w_{lab}\"] = Wlag[col].mean()\n",
        "            row[f\"avg_abs_w_{lab}\"] = Wlag[col].abs().mean()\n",
        "            row[f\"freq_long_{lab}\"] = (Wlag[col] > 1e-8).mean()\n",
        "            row[f\"freq_short_{lab}\"] = (Wlag[col] < -1e-8).mean()\n",
        "            row[f\"sign_change_rate_{lab}\"] = sign_change_rate[col]\n",
        "\n",
        "        rows.append(row)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(rows) == 0:\n",
        "        return pd.DataFrame()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"base_strategy\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_leg_stability_df = v6_leg_stability(V6_RV_WEIGHTS)\n",
        "v6_leg_stability_df.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_leg_stability.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 leg stability diagnostics:\")\n",
        "display(v6_leg_stability_df.round(4))"
      ]
    },
