2.8867513459481293e-05,\n        \"min\": -3e-05,\n        \"max\": 2e-05,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          2e-05\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"min_positive_periods_CS_AR_F5\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 0,\n        \"min\": 4,\n        \"max\": 4,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          4\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"v6_candidate_level\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"repo_candidate\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"comment\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 2,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Passes CS, AR and Fixed5 with low beta/PC exposure. Separate repo is defensible with conservative wording.\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "V6 artifacts exported to: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire\n",
            "V6 Excel bundle: macroanchor_curve_rv_v3_outputs/v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire/v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire_bundle.xlsx\n",
            "V6 reading rule:\n",
            "- repo_candidate = separate RV repo is defensible, but wording must be low-risk/low-return and cost-sensitive.\n",
            "- robust_repo_candidate = strong pure-RV spin-off.\n",
            "- candidate_needs_inference_review = do not spin off before reviewing placebo/bootstrap evidence.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# ===== 43. V6 final proof-of-fire verdict and export bundle =====\n",
        "\n",
        "# Strategy-level pass summary.\n",
        "def v6_strategy_verdict(v6_all, v6_breakeven, v6_inference=None, v6_sub_summary=None):\n",
        "    rows = []\n",
        "    key_costs = [\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\", \"Fixed10bp\", \"AR_2x_lagged\", \"Stress_AR_3x_events\"]\n",
        "    for base, g in v6_all.groupby(\"base_strategy\"):\n",
        "        gg = g.set_index(\"cost_model\")\n",
        "        row = {\"base_strategy\": base}\n",
        "        for cm in key_costs:\n",
        "            row[f\"passes_{cm}\"] = bool(gg.loc[cm, \"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\"]) if cm in gg.index else False\n",
        "        row[\"n_proof_fire_passes\"] = int(gg[\"passes_v6_proof_fire_gate\"].sum())\n",
        "        row[\"max_fixed_bps_passing_gate\"] = v6_breakeven.loc[base, \"max_fixed_bps_passing_v6_gate\"] if base in v6_breakeven.index else np.nan\n",
        "        row[\"max_fixed_bps_positive_net\"] = v6_breakeven.loc[base, \"max_fixed_bps_positive_net\"] if base in v6_breakeven.index else np.nan\n",
        "        row[\"max_R2_PC123_keycosts\"] = gg.loc[[c for c in key_costs if c in gg.index], \"R2_yield_PC123\"].max() if len(gg) else np.nan\n",
        "        row[\"max_R2_10Y_keycosts\"] = gg.loc[[c for c in key_costs if c in gg.index], \"R2_vs_10Y\"].max() if len(gg) else np.nan\n",
        "        row[\"max_abs_duration_keycosts\"] = gg.loc[[c for c in key_costs if c in gg.index], \"avg_duration_exposure\"].abs().max() if len(gg) else np.nan\n",
        "        row[\"turnover\"] = gg[\"ann_turnover\"].median() if \"ann_turnover\" in gg else np.nan\n",
        "        # Placebo/inference summary.\n",
        "        if v6_inference is not None and len(v6_inference) > 0:\n",
        "            inf = v6_inference[v6_inference[\"base_strategy\"] == base]\n",
        "            inf_key = inf[inf[\"cost_model\"].isin([\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\"])]\n",
        "            row[\"max_placebo_p_sharpe_CS_AR_F5\"] = inf_key[\"p_value_sharpe_ge_obs\"].max() if len(inf_key) else np.nan\n",
        "            row[\"min_boot_ann_p05_CS_AR_F5\"] = inf_key[\"boot_ann_p05\"].min() if len(inf_key) else np.nan\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            row[\"max_placebo_p_sharpe_CS_AR_F5\"] = np.nan\n",
        "            row[\"min_boot_ann_p05_CS_AR_F5\"] = np.nan\n",
        "        # Subperiod summary.\n",
        "        if v6_sub_summary is not None and len(v6_sub_summary) > 0:\n",
        "            sub = v6_sub_summary[(v6_sub_summary[\"base_strategy\"] == base) & (v6_sub_summary[\"cost_model\"].isin([\"CS_lagged\", \"AR_lagged\", \"Fixed5bp\"]))]\n",
        "            row[\"min_positive_periods_CS_AR_F5\"] = sub[\"positive_periods\"].min() if len(sub) else np.nan\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            row[\"min_positive_periods_CS_AR_F5\"] = np.nan\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Decision ladder.\n",
        "        level = \"reject\"\n",
        "        comment = \"Fails proof-of-fire requirements.\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS_lagged\"] and row[\"passes_AR_lagged\"]:\n",
        "            level = \"dynamic_cost_candidate\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS and AR, but fixed-cost/stress evidence is insufficient.\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS_lagged\"] and row[\"passes_AR_lagged\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed5bp\"]:\n",
        "            level = \"repo_candidate\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS, AR and Fixed5 with low beta/PC exposure. Separate repo is defensible with conservative wording.\"\n",
        "        if row[\"passes_CS_lagged\"] and row[\"passes_AR_lagged\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed5bp\"] and row[\"passes_Fixed10bp\"]:\n",
        "            level = \"robust_repo_candidate\"\n",
        "            comment = \"Passes CS, AR, Fixed5 and Fixed10. Strong separate-repo candidate.\"\n",
        "        if level in [\"repo_candidate\", \"robust_repo_candidate\"]:\n",
        "            # Penalize if placebo evidence looks weak or PC exposure is not clean.\n",
        "            if pd.notna(row[\"max_placebo_p_sharpe_CS_AR_F5\"]) and row[\"max_placebo_p_sharpe_CS_AR_F5\"] > 0.20:\n",
        "                level = \"candidate_needs_inference_review\"\n",
        "                comment = \"Cost gates pass, but placebo evidence is weak; report as candidate, not final alpha.\"\n",
        "            if pd.notna(row[\"max_R2_PC123_keycosts\"]) and row[\"max_R2_PC123_keycosts\"] >= 0.10:\n",
        "                level = \"candidate_needs_pc_exposure_review\"\n",
        "                comment = \"Cost gates pass, but PC exposure is too high for pure-RV claim.\"\n",
        "        row[\"v6_candidate_level\"] = level\n",
        "        row[\"comment\"] = comment\n",
        "        rows.append(row)\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(rows).set_index(\"base_strategy\").sort_values([\"v6_candidate_level\", \"n_proof_fire_passes\"], ascending=[True, False])\n",
        "\n",
        "v6_verdict = v6_strategy_verdict(v6_all, v6_breakeven, v6_inference, v6_sub_summary)\n",
        "v6_verdict.to_csv(V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_final_proof_of_fire_verdict.csv\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 final proof-of-fire verdict:\")\n",
        "display(v6_verdict.round(5))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Export one Excel bundle for review.\n",
        "v6_bundle_path = V6_OUT_DIR / \"v6_pure_rv_proof_of_fire_bundle.xlsx\"\n",
        "with pd.ExcelWriter(v6_bundle_path) as writer:\n",
        "    v6_all[show_v6_cols].to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"all_cost_pc_gate\")\n",
        "    v6_breakeven.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"breakeven_summary\")\n",
        "    v6_fixed_grid.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"fixed_cost_grid\", index=False)\n",
        "    if len(v6_inference) > 0:\n",
        "        v6_inference.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"placebo_bootstrap\")\n",
        "    if len(v6_subperiod) > 0:\n",
        "        v6_subperiod.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"subperiods\", index=False)\n",
        "    if len(v6_sub_summary) > 0:\n",
        "        v6_sub_summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"subperiod_summary\", index=False)\n",
        "    v6_leg_stability_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"leg_stability\")\n",
        "    v6_verdict.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=\"final_verdict\")\n",
        "    for base, W in V6_RV_WEIGHTS.items():\n",
        "        safe = base[:31].replace(\"/\", \"_\")\n",
        "        W.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=safe)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"V6 artifacts exported to:\", V6_OUT_DIR)\n",
        "print(\"V6 Excel bundle:\", v6_bundle_path)\n",
        "print(\"V6 reading rule:\")\n",
        "print(\"- repo_candidate = separate RV repo is defensible, but wording must be low-risk/low-return and cost-sensitive.\")\n",
        "print(\"- robust_repo_candidate = strong pure-RV spin-off.\")\n",
        "print(\"- candidate_needs_inference_review = do not spin off before reviewing placebo/bootstrap evidence.\")\n"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": []
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "display_name": "Python 3",
      "language": "python",
      "name": "python3"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "python",

    }
  },
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 5
}
